text: w'ani' yna' shemani' dbnwni' dysrayil: d'tilwn lmeṣriyn: 'am ya'qwb: 'nasha' wbaytwhy 'tilwn.
r'wben: shem'wn: liwy: wyhwda':
'ysakar: zbwlwn: wbenyamiyn:
dan: wnaptaly: gad: w'ashiyr.
wklay ganati' dpleṭlwn mn ḥaṣeh dya'qwb: shab'y ganati' hwaw. wyawsep gaw meṣriyn yhwa'.
wmetli' yawsep: wklay 'aḥwnwatwhy: wklih hw dawra'.
wbnay ysrayil prilwn: wzedlwn raba': wgwrweslwn: wzwrbenwn raba' raba': wpeshla' mlyta' 'ar'a' menay.
wqemli' malka' ḥadta' 'al meṣriyn: dla' yde'li' lyawsep.
w'meri' lṭayepwhy: ha': ṭayepa' dbnay ysrayil raba' yli' wzarbana' menan.
timwn 'abdak hawnanwta' 'elih: la' hwi' dzayed: whawya' dqawem plasha': wgme' 'wp hw 'al sanyanan: wpalesh 'aman: w'aseq mn d'aha' 'ar'a'.
wmwteblwn 'alwhy sarkari' dshwḥra' qa' dmalyeṣy hwaw lih bkaratay. wbnili' mdynati' d'anbari' qa' per'wn: lpytwm wlra'msys.
wkma' dmalyeṣy hwaw lih: hatka' zayed hwa' whatka' garwes hwa': w'eqla' 'elay mn qam bnay ysrayil.
wmwpleḥlwn meṣrayi' lbnay ysrayil bzwlm.
wmwmrelwn lḥayay bpwlḥana' qeshya': bṭyna': wbkarpyki': wbkl pwlḥana' gaw deshta': kl pwlḥanay dmwpleḥlwn byay bzwlm.
w'meri' malka' dmeṣriyn lḥayata' 'ebrayata': dshema' dḥda' shepra': wshema' dhy 'ḥirta': pw'a':
w'meri': 'yman dmadyelytwn l'ebrayata': wḥazytwn 'al kwrsy dylyadta': 'en brwna' yli': mamyetytwn lih: w'en brata' yla': ḥaya'.
wzde'lwn ḥayata' mn 'alaha': wla' 'bedlwn da'ky dhwmzemli' 'amay malka' dmeṣriyn: wḥwmilwn ḥayi' lyali'.
wqrili' malka' dmeṣriyn lḥayata': w'meri' 'elay: qamwdy 'bedlawkwn 'aha' shwla': wḥwmilawkwn ḥayi' lyali':
w'merwn ḥayata' lper'wn: sabab dli' yna' 'ayk baktati' meṣrayata' 'ebrayata': sabab dḥayi' yna': mn qam d'atya' lkeslay ḥayta': ki' yaldy.
w'bedli' ṭabta' 'alaha' lḥayata': wzedli' ṭayepa' wzwrbenwn raba'.
whwila': dsabab dzde'lwn ḥayata' mn 'alaha': 'bedli' qatay bati'.
wpqedli' per'wn lklih ṭayepwhy: bi'mara': kl brwna' dpayesh ylyda': lnahra' rapytwn lih: wkl brata' ḥamytwn ḥayta'.
w'zeli' 'nasha' mn byit liwy: wshqeli' lbratih dliwy.
wbṭena' bakta': wyledla' brwna': wqam ḥazya' lih dshapyra' hwa': wqam ṭashya' lih ṭla' yarḥi'.
wla' mṣila' medri' lṭashwwwhy: wshqela' qatih qibwta' dpapirwwan: wshe'yala' bḥimar wbqyr: wmwtebla' gawwh lyala': wmwtbala' gaw pertwk 'al septih dnahra'.
wklila' ḥatwhy mn reḥqa': lyda'ya' mwdy payesh hwa' 'byda' 'elih.
wṣlila' bratih dper'wn lesḥaya' gaw nahra': wḥamatwh beḥdara' hwaw 'al marza' dnahra'. wḥzila' lqibwta' bgawa' dpertwk: wshwdera' lḥidamtwh wshqylala'.
wpteḥla' wḥzila' lyala': wha': yala' bebkaya'. w'tilwn raḥmwh 'alwhy: w'mera': mn yali' d'ebrayi' yli' 'aha'.
w'mera' ḥatwhy lbratih dper'wn: 'azaln wqaryan qataky bakta' mameṣanta' mn 'ebrayata': wmameṣa' qa' dyaky l'aha' yala':
w'mera' 'elah bratih dper'wn: zi'y. w'zela' hy ḥamta' wqrila' lyemih dyala'.
w'mera' 'elah bratih dper'wn: labely l'aha' yala': wmameṣy lih qa' dyy: w'ana' bet yahban haqaky. wshqela' hy bakta' lyala': wmwmeṣla' 'elih.
wgwrwesli' hw yala': wqam ma'ya' lih lbratih dper'wn: whwili' qatwh lbrwna'. wqrila' shemwhy: mwshi': w'mera': sabab dmn mya' gryshtwhy ywan.
whwila' b'any ywmani': wgwrwesli' mwshi': wpleṭli' lkes 'aḥwnwatwhy: wḥzili' bkaratay: wḥzili' 'nasha' meṣraya': bemḥaya' l'anasha' 'ebraya' mn 'aḥwnwatwhy.
wderi' l'aha' giba' wlhw giba': wḥzili' dlayt hwa' 'nasha': wmḥili' lhw meṣraya': wṭwmerih gaw sila'.
wpleṭli' bywma' dtray: wha': tray 'nashi' 'ebrayi' beplasha': w'meri' l'abdana' dgnaha': qamwdy bemḥaya' ywet lḥabrwk:
w'meri': many qam mateb lwk l'nasha' risha' wdayana' 'alan: ha' leqṭaly 'ant bi'mara' ywet: 'ayk dqṭelwk lmeṣraya': wzde'li' mwshi': w'meri': meged peshli' yde'ya' 'aha' shwla'.
wshme'li' per'wn 'aha' shwla': wbe'li' leqṭala' lmwshi'. w'reqli' mwshi' mn qam per'wn: wytebli' b'ar'a' dmedyan: wytebli' 'al bira'.
wlkahna' dmedyan 'yt hwaw shaba' bnati': w'tilwn wgreshlwn: wmlilwn ḥawdi' lmashtwwi' pesqa' dbabay.
w'tilwn ra'yi' wṭrydaylwn: wqemli' mwshi' wpwrqayli': wmwshtili' lpesqay.
w'tilwn lkes r'w'iyl babay: w'meri': da'ky yla' dmwlyezlawkwn li'taya' 'edyw ywma':
w'merwn: 'nasha' meṣraya' qam paṣi' lan mn 'yda' dra'yi': w'wp megrasha' greshli' qatan: wmwshtili' lpesqa'.
w'meri' lbnatwhy: w'ayka' yli': 'aha' qamwdy shbeqlawkwn lhw 'nasha': qrimwn lih w'akel laḥma'.
whwili' razy mwshi' letyaba' lkes dhw 'nasha': wyehbeli' ṣepwra' bratwhy lmwshi'.
wyledla' brwna': wqrili' shemwhy: gershwm: sabab d'meri': mashaḥaṭ hwily b'ar'a' nwkrayta'.
whwila' b'any ywmani' raba': wmetli' malka' dmeṣriyn: wtwneḥlwn bnay ysrayil mn rigwta': wmwqweḥlwn: w'seqla' g'aytay lkes 'alaha': mn rigwta'.
wshme'li' 'alaha' tanaḥtay: wtkeri' 'alaha' lqawlwhy 'am 'abraham: 'am 'ysḥaq: w'am ya'qwb.
wḥzili' 'alaha' lbnay ysrayil: wyde'li' 'alaha'.
wmwshi' mar'wwi' hwa' l'erbi' dytrwn ḥemyanwhy: kahna' dmedyan: wlwbeli' l'erbi' batr barya': w'tili' lṭwrih d'alaha': lḥwryb.
wpeshli' ḥezya' mala'kih dmarya' 'elih blaha' dnwra' mn gawa' dsanya': wḥzili': wha': sanya' beqyada' bnwra': wsanya' la' peshli' 'kyla'.
w'meri' mwshi': bet qalben 'adya' wḥazen l'aha' ḥezwa' gwra': qamwdy li' yli' beqyadat sanya'.
wḥzili' marya' dqlebli' leḥzaya': wqrili' 'elih 'alaha' mn gaw sanya': w'meri': mwshi': mwshi'. w'meri': ha' 'ana'.
w'meri': la' qarbenet la'ka'. shaleḥ ṣawlwk m'al 'aqlwk: sabab ddwkta' d'ant beklaya' ywet 'alwh 'ar'a' qadyshta' yla'.
w'meri': 'ana' ywen 'alahih dbabwk: 'alahih d'abraham: 'alahih d'ysḥaq: w'alahih dya'qwb. wṭwshyali' mwshi' patwhy: sabab dzde'li' mn leḥyara' l'alaha'.
w'meri' marya': meḥzaya' ḥzily lyalṣwy dṭayepy dyli' gaw meṣriyn: wmaqwaḥtay shme'ly mn qam mapleḥanwhy dshwḥra': sabab dki' yad'en ldardwhy:

wṣelya' ywen lpaṣwwwhy mn 'yda' dmeṣrayi': wlma'swqwhy mn d'aha' 'ar'a' l'ar'a' ṣpayy wrwyḥta': l'ar'a' magryanta' dḥalba' wdebsha': ldwka' dkna'naya': wḥiytaya': w'amwraya': wparzaya': wḥawaya': wyabwsaya'.
w'adya': ha': maqwaḥta' dbnay ysrayil 'tila' lkesly: w'wp ḥzily lyalṣwy dmeṣrayi' malywṣi' yna' 'elay.
w'adya' ta': wbet shadrenwk lkes per'wn: wpaleṭ lṭayepy: bnay ysrayil: mn meṣriyn.
w'meri' mwshi' l'alaha': many ywen 'ana' d'azeln lkes per'wn: wdpalṭen lbnay ysrayil mn meṣriyn:
w'meri': sabab dbet hawen 'amwk: w'aha' 'elwk nyshanqa' d'ana' shwdrwk ywen. 'yman dpalṭet lṭayepa' mn meṣriyn: bet palḥytwn l'alaha' 'al d'aha' ṭwra'.
w'meri' mwshi' l'alaha': ha': 'ana' 'aziln lkes bnay ysrayil w'amren 'elay: 'alaha' d'abahatawkwn shwdreni' lkeslawkwn: wbet 'amry 'ely: mwdy yli' shemwhy: mwdy 'amren 'elay:
w'meri' 'alaha' lmwshi': 'ahyah 'ashar 'ahyah. w'meri': hatka' 'amret lbnay ysrayil: 'ahyah shwdreni' lkeslawkwn.

w'meri' medri' 'alaha' lmwshi': hatka' 'amret lbnay ysrayil: marya' 'alaha' d'abahatawkwn: 'alahih d'abraham: 'alahih d'ysḥaq: w'alahih dya'qwb: shwdreni' lkeslawkwn. 'aha' yli' shemy l'alam: w'aha' yli' tkary ldawra' dawra'.

zi': wgm'et lḥwardeqni' dysrayil: w'amret 'elay: marya' 'alaha' d'abahatawkwn peshli' ḥezya' 'ely: 'alahih d'abraham: d'ysḥaq: wdya'qwb: bi'mara': msaḥbwri' swḥbery 'elawkwn wlhw dpeshli' 'byda' 'elawkwn gaw meṣriyn.
w'mery: bet ma'sqenawkwn mn yalṣwy dmeṣriyn: l'ar'a' dkna'naya': wḥiytaya': w'amwraya': wparzaya': wḥawaya': wyabwsaya': l'ar'a' magryanta' dḥalba' wdebsha'.

wbet sham'y bqalwk: w'azelt 'ant wḥwardeqni' dysrayil lkes malka' dmeṣriyn: w'amrytwn 'elih: marya' 'alaha' d'ebrayi' tpyqa' yli' byen: w'adya' 'azalk: parpwli' ywak: 'wrḥa' dṭla' ywmani' gaw barya': w'abdak debḥa' lmarya' 'alahan.
w'ana' ki' yad'en dli' yahbelawkwn malka' dmeṣriyn li'zala': wla' b'yda' zarbanta'.
wbet pashṭen 'ydy wbet maḥen lmeṣriyn bklay 'agebwyaty dbet 'abden bgawwh: wbatr hada': bet shaderawkwn.
wbet yahben shapaqat l'aha' ṭayepa' b'ayni' dmeṣrayi'. wbet hawya': 'yman d'azlytwn: li' 'azlytwn spyqi':
wbet ṭalba' bakta' mn shbabtwh: wmn mashaḥaṭ dbaytwh: ma'ni' dsi'ma': wma'ni' ddahba': wgwli': wmalbeshytwn 'al bnwnawkwn w'al bnatawkwn: wbet salbytwn lmeṣrayi'.
wgwwebli' mwshi' w'meri': wha': li' hameny 'ely: wli' sham'y bqaly: sabab dbet 'amry: la' peshli' ḥezya' 'elwk marya'.
w'meri' 'elih marya': mwdy yli' 'aha' b'ydwk: w'meri': ḥwṭra'.
w'meri': rapy lih l'ar'a': wrwpilih l'ar'a': whwili' lḥwwi': w'reqli' mwshi' mn qamwhy.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': pasheṭ 'ydwk wdbwq bṭwprwhy: wpwshṭali' 'ydwhy: wdbeqli' byih: whwili' lḥwṭra' b'ydwhy:
qa' dhameny dpeshli' ḥezya' 'elwk marya' 'alaha' d'abahatay: 'alahih d'abraham: 'alahih d'ysḥaq: w'alahih dya'qwb.
w'meri' marya' 'elih medri': ma'wer 'adya' 'ydwk gaw 'wbwk: wmw'werali' 'ydwhy gaw 'wbwhy. wpwlṭali': wha': 'ydwhy gwrbenta' 'ayk talga'.
w'meri': mader 'ydwk l'wbwk: wmwderali' 'ydwhy l'wbwhy: wpwlṭali' mn 'wbwhy: wha': dyrta' 'ayk besrwhy.
whawya': 'en la' hameny 'elwk: wla' sham'y lqala' dnyshanqa' qadmaya': hameny lqala' dnyshanqa' 'ḥaraya'.
whawya': 'en la' hameny 'wp lterway 'ani' nyshanqi': wla' sham'y lqalwk: 'ayga' shaqlet mn mya' dnahra': wtapḥet lberza': wbet hawy mya' dshaqlet mn nahra': bet hawy ldema' bberza'.

w'meri' mwshi' lmarya': parpwli' ywen: ya' mary: li' ywen 'nasha' dmamlla' 'ana': 'wp mn temal 'wp mn ywma' 'ḥirna': 'wp mn d'ayga' dhwmzemlwk 'am rigwk: sabab dyaqwra' dpwma' wyaqwra' dleshana' ywen.
w'meri' marya' 'elih: many mwtebli' pwma' lbarnasha': yan many ki' 'abed kara': yan la'la': yan ḥazyana': yan kwra': ha' la' 'ana' marya':
w'adya' zi': w'ana' bet hawen 'am pwmwk: wbet malpenwk mendy dhamzemet.
w'meri': ya' mary: shader: parpwli' ywen: byid mn dshadret.
wḥemla' karbih dmarya' bmwshi': w'meri': ha' li' yli' 'ahrwn 'aḥwnwk liwaya': ki' yad'en dmhamzwmi' ki' hamzem hw: w'wp ha': hw beplaṭa' l'wrḥwk: wbet ḥazi' lwk wḥadi' blebwhy.
whamzemet 'amih: wmatbet himezmani' bpwmwhy: w'ana' bet hawen 'am pwmwk: w'am pwmwhy: wbet malpenawkwn mendy d'abdytwn.
whamzem hw mn gibwk 'am ṭayepa': whawya': dhw hawi' qatwk lpwma': w'ant hawet 'elih l'alaha'.
wla'ha' ḥwṭra' shaqlet b'ydwk: d'abdet byih l'any nyshanqi'.
w'zeli' mwshi' wderi' lkes yatrwn ḥemyanwhy: w'meri' 'elih: 'azeln: parpwli' ywen: wdayren lkes 'aḥwnwaty dyna' gaw meṣriyn: wḥazen 'en hish 'any ḥayi' yna'. w'meri' yatrwn lmwshi': zi' bshlama'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi' gaw medyan: zi' dwr lmeṣriyn: sabab dmetlwn klay 'any 'nashi' dbeṭ'aya' hwaw batr ganwk.
wshqeli' mwshi' lbaktwhy wlbnwnwhy: wmwrkebayli' 'al ḥmara': wderi' l'ar'a' dmeṣriyn. wshqeli' mwshi' lḥwṭra' d'alaha' b'ydwhy.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': kad 'azelt ledara' lmeṣriyn: ḥzy klay 'agebwyati' dmwtba' ywen b'ydwk: w'abdet lhwn qam per'wn: w'ana' bet maqshen llebwhy: wli' shader lṭayepa'.
w'amret lper'wn: hatka' bi'mara' yli' yihwwa': brwny bwkry yli' ysrayil.
wbi'mara' ywen 'elwk: shader lbrwny: wpaleḥ ly: wmaḥpelet lshadwrwhy: ha': 'ana' beqṭala' ywen lbrwnwk bwkrwk.
whwila' b'wrḥa' bmanzyl: wtpeqli' byih marya': wbe'li' lmamywtwhy.
wshqela' ṣepwra' semṭa': wqṭe'la' l'wrlwta' dbrwnwh: wrwpyala' l'aqlwhy: w'mera': meged: ḥetna' ddema' ywet 'ely.
wrwpili' 'yda' menih. 'ayga' 'mera': ḥetna' ddema' sabab dgzwrta'.
w'meri' marya' l'ahrwn: zi' l'wrḥih dmwshi' lbarya'. w'zeli' wtpeqli' byih bṭwrih d'alaha': wnsheqlih.
wmwde'li' mwshi' l'ahrwn lklay himezmani' dmarya': dqam shaderih: wlklay nyshanqi' dqam paqed lih.
w'zelwn mwshi' w'ahrwn: wgwme'lwn lklay ḥwardeqni' dbnay ysrayil.
whwmzemli' 'ahrwn klay himezmani' dhwmzemli' marya' 'am mwshi': w'bedli' nyshanqi' qam 'ayni' dṭayepa'.
whwmeni' ṭayepa': wshme'lwn dswḥberi' marya' lbnay ysrayil: wdḥzili' lyalṣwway: wkeplwn wsgedlwn.
wbatr hada' 'tilwn mwshi' w'ahrwn: w'merwn lper'wn: hatka' bi'mara' yli' yihwwa' 'alaha' dysrayil: shader lṭayepy: w'abdy 'i'da' 'ely gaw barya'.
w'meri' per'wn: many yli' yihwwa' dsham'en bqalwhy: lshadwri' lysrayil: li' yad'en lyihwwa': w'wp lysrayil li' shadren.
w'merwn: 'alaha' d'ebrayi' tpyqa' yli' byen: 'azalk: parpwli' ywak: 'wrḥa' dṭla' ywmani' gaw barya': w'abdak debḥa' lyihwwa' 'alahan: la' hwi' dtapeq byen bmawtana' yan bsaypa'.
w'meri' 'elay malka' dmeṣriyn: qamwdy: 'ay mwshi' w'ahrwn: mabṭwli' ytwn lṭayepa' mn pwlḥanwhy: zimwn lkaratawkwn.
w'meri' per'wn: ha': raba' yna' 'adya' ṭayepa' d'ar'a': wmashlwway ytwn mn karatay.
wpqedli' per'wn bhw ywma' lmapleḥani' dshwḥra' gaw ṭayepa': wlsarkarwhy: bi'mara':
la' mazyedytwn lyahba' tebna' lṭayepa': ledraya' karpyki' 'ayk temal ywma' 'ḥirna'. 'any 'azly wgm'y lhwn tebna'.
wqabal dkarpyki' d'any be'bada' hwaw temal ywma' 'ḥirna': matbytwn 'alay: la' mabṣerytwn menah: sabab dripyi' yna' 'any: bwt d'aha': 'any maqwwḥi' yna': bi'mara': 'azalk 'abdak debḥa' l'alahan.
yaqren pwlḥana' 'al d'ani' 'nashi': wpalḥy byih: wla' gashqy bhimezmani' ddwgla'.
wpleṭlwn mapleḥani' dshwḥra' dṭayepa': wsarkarwhy: w'merwn lṭayepa': bi'mara': hatka' bi'mara' yli' per'wn: li' yahbenawkwn tebna'.
'aḥtwn zimwn shqwlwn lawkwn tebna': m'ayka' dmakḥytwn: sabab dli' payesh mwbṣera' mn pwlḥanawkwn mendy.
wbwrbezli' ṭayepa' gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn lgm'wwi' kwlash ltebna'.
wmapleḥani' dshwḥra' malyeṣy hwaw: bi'mara': tamemwn pwlḥanawkwn: shwla' dywma' bywmwhy: 'ayk dkad 'yt hwa' tebna'.

wpeshlwn meḥyi' sarkari' dbnay ysrayil: dmwtbi' hwaw 'aly mapleḥani' dshwḥra' dper'wn: bi'mara': qamwdy la' twmemlawkwn qabalawkwn bdrayta' dkarpyki': 'ayk temal ywma' 'ḥirna': 'wp qwdmi' 'wp 'edyw ywma':
w'tilwn sarkari' dbnay ysrayil wmwqweḥlwn lper'wn: bi'mara': qamwdy be'bada' ywet hatka' lrigawatwk:
tebna' li' yli' pyasha' ywhba' lrigawatwk: wkarpyki': bi'mara' yna' 'elan: 'bwdwn: wha': rigawatwk pyasha' yna' meḥyi': wḥṭyta' dṭayepwk yla'.
w'meri': ripyi' ytwn: ripyi': bwt d'aha': 'aḥtwn bi'mara' ytwn: 'azalk 'abdak debḥa' lyihwwa'.
w'adya' zimwn plwḥwn: wtebna' li' payesh ywhba' 'elawkwn: wqabal dkarpyki' yahbytwn.
wḥzilwn sarkari' dbnay ysrayil ganay b'ahwal sryta': bi'mara': la' mabṣerytwn mn karpykawkwn shwla' dywma' bywmwhy.
wtpeqlwn bmwshi' wba'hrwn beklaya' l'wrḥay: kad pleṭlwn mn lkes per'wn:
w'merwn 'elay: ḥayer marya' 'alawkwn w'abed dywan: sabab dmwḥmeqlawkwn riyḥan b'ayni' dper'wn wb'ayni' drigawatwhy: lyahba' saypa' b'yday leqṭalan.
wderi' mwshi' lkes marya': w'meri': ya' mary: qamwdy 'bedlwk sryta' l'aha' ṭayepa': 'aha' qamwdy shwdrenwk:
mn 'ayga' d'tily lkes per'wn lhamzwmi' bshemwk: 'bedli' sryta' l'aha' ṭayepa': wmpaṣwwi' la' pwṣilwk lṭayepwk.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': 'adya' bet ḥazet mendy d'abden lper'wn: sabab db'yda' zarbanta' bet shaderwn: wb'yda' zarbanta' bet ṭaredlwn mn 'ar'why.
whwmzemli' 'alaha' 'am mwshi': w'meri' 'elih: 'ana' ywen yihwwa':
wpeshly ḥezya' l'abraham: l'ysḥaq: wlya'qwb: b'iylshaday: wbshemy yihwwa' la' peshly mwde'ya' 'elay.
w'wp mwqemly lqawly 'amay: lyahba' 'elay 'ar'a' dkna'n: 'ar'a' dmashaḥaṭwtay: dmwshḥeṭlwn gawwh.
w'wp 'ana' shme'ly tanaḥta' dbnay ysrayil: dmeṣrayi' ma'bwde' yna' byay rigwta': wtkyra' ywen lqawly.
bwt d'aha': 'mwr lbnay ysrayil: 'anal ywen yihwwa': wbet palṭenawkwn mn tḥwt karati' dmeṣrayi': wbet paṣenawkwn mn rigwtay: wbet parqenawkwn bdra'na' pwshṭa': wbdywani' gwri'.
wbet shaqlenawkwn qaty lṭayepa': wbet hawen 'elawkwn 'alaha': wbet yad'ytwn d'ana' ywen yihwwa' 'alahawkwn: palṭanawkwn mn tḥwt karati' dmeṣrayi'.
wbet ma'yenawkwn l'ar'a' dmwremly 'ydy lyahbwh l'abraham: l'ysḥaq: wlya'qwb: wbet yahbenah 'elawkwn yartwta': 'ana' yihwwa'.
whwmzemli' mwshi' hatka' 'am bnay ysrayil: wla' shme'lwn lmwshi' mn kerywta' dbina': wmn rigwta' qshyta'.
whwmzemli' marya' 'am mwshi': bi'mara':
'wwr hamzem 'am per'wn: malka' dmeṣriyn: dshader lbnay ysrayil mn 'ar'w'y.
whwmzemli' mwshi' qam marya': bi'mara': ha': bnay ysrayil la' shme'lwn 'ely: wda'ky bet shami' ly per'wn: w'ana' 'wrla' dsepwati':
whwmzemli' marya' 'am mwshi' w'am 'ahrwn: wpwqdayli' lkes bnay ysrayil: wlkes per'wn malka' dmeṣriyn: lpalwṭi' lbnay ysrayil mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
'ani' yna' rishani' dbayta' dbabawatay: bnwni' dr'wben bwkrih dysrayil: ḥnwk: wpalw: ḥeṣrwn: wkarmy. 'ani' yna' 'wgagi' dr'wben.
wbnwni' dshem'wn: yamw'iyl: wyamyn: w'ahad: wyakyn: wṣaḥar: wsha'wl brwna' dkna'nayta'. 'ani' yna' 'wgagi' dshem'wn.
w'ani' yna' shemani' dbnwni' dliwy: ltawldatay: gershwn: wqahat: wmrary. wsheni' dḥaayi' dliwy: ma'' wtlayy wshaba' sheni' hwaw.
bnwni' dgershwn: lebny: wshem'y: l'wgagay.
wbnwni' dqahat: 'amram: wḥeṣhar: wḥebrwn: w'wzy'il. wsheni' dḥayi' dqahat: ma'' wtlayy wṭla' sheni' hwaw.
wbnwni' dmrary: maḥly: wmwshy. 'ani' yna' 'wgagi' dliwy: ltawldatay.
wshqeli' 'amram lywkabad 'amtwhy 'elih lbakta': wyledla' qatih l'ahrwn: wlmwshi'. wsheni' dḥayi' d'amram ma'' wtlayy wshaba' sheni' hwaw.
wbnwni' dyeṣhar: qwrḥ: wnapag: wzekry.
wbnwni' d'wzy'iyl: mysha'iyl: w'ilṣapan: wsetry.
wshqeli' 'ahrwn l'ilyshba': brata' d'amynadab: ḥatih dnaḥshwn: 'elih lbakta': wyledla' qatih lnadab: wla'byhw: l'ily'azar: wl'ytamar.
wbnwni' dqwrḥ: 'asyr: w'iylqana': w'aby'asap. 'ani' yna' 'wgagi' dqwrḥayi'.
w'ily'azar brwna' d'ahwn shqeli' 'elih mn bnati' dpwṭy'iyl lbakta': wyledla' qatih lpynḥes. 'ani' yna' rishani' dbabawati' dliwayi' l'wgagay.
'aha' yli' 'ahrwn wmwshi': d'meri' marya' 'elay: palṭwn lbnay ysrayil mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: bḥaylawatay.
'ani' ki' hamzemy hwaw 'am per'wn malka' dmeṣriyn: lpalwṭi' lbnay ysrayil mn meṣriyn. 'aha' yli' mwshi' w'ahrwn.
whwila': bywma' dhwmzemli' marya' 'am mwshi' b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn:
whwmzemli' marya' 'am mwshi': bi'mara': 'ana' ywen yihwwa': hamzem 'am per'wn malka' dmezriyn kl d'ana' hamzwmi' ywen 'amwk.
w'meri' mwshi' qam marya': ha': 'ana' 'wrla' dsepwati': wda'ky bet shame' 'ely per'wn:
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': ḥzy: ywhbwk ywen 'alaha' lper'wn: w'ahrwn 'aḥwnwk hawi' nbywk.
'ant hamzemet lkl dpaqdenwk: w'ahrwn 'aḥwnwk hamzem 'am per'wn: wshader lbnay ysrayil mn 'ar'why.
w'ana' bet maqshen llebih dper'wn: wbet mazyeden lnyshanqy wl'agebwyaty b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wle' shame' 'elawkwn per'wn: wbet matben 'ydy 'al meṣriyn: wbet palṭen lḥaylawaty: lṭayepy bnay ysrayil: mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: bdywani' gwri'.
wbet yad'y meṣrayi': d'ana' ywen yihwwa': kad pashṭen 'ydy 'al meṣriyn: wpalṭen lbnay ysrayil mn gaway.
w'bedlwn mwshi' w'ahrwn: da'ky dpqedli' marya' 'elay: hatka' 'bedlwn.
wmwshi' bar tmany shenia' hwa': w'ahrwn bar tmany wṭla' shenia' hwa': 'yman dhwmzemlwn 'am per'wn.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi' wla'hrwn: bi'mara':
'yman dhamzem 'amawkwn per'wn: bi'mara': hablwn 'aḥtwn nyshanqa': w'amret l'ahrwn: shqwl ḥwṭrwk wrapy qam per'wn dhawi' ltanyna'.
w'tilwn mwshi' w'ahrwn lkes per'wn: w'bedlwn hatka' da'ky dpqedli' marya'. wrwpili' 'ahrwn ḥwṭrwhy qam per'wn: wqam rigawatwhy: whwili' ltanyna'.
wqrili' 'wp per'wn l'aqeldari' wlḥarashi': w'bedlwn 'wp 'any: remeldari' dmeṣriyn bḥershay hatka'.
wrwpilwn 'nasha' ḥwṭrwhy: whwilwn ltanyni': wbli'li' ḥwṭra' d'ahrwn lḥwṭray.
wqshili' lebih dper'wn: wla' shme'li' 'elay: da'ky dhwmzemli' marya'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': yaqwra' yli' lebih dper'wn: maḥpwli' yli' lshadwri' lṭayepa'.
zi' lkes per'wn bṣapra': ha': beplaṭa' yli' lmya': wkalet l'wrḥwhy 'al septih dnahra': wḥwṭra' dpeshli' mwdera' lḥwwi' shaqlet b'ydwk.
w'amret 'elih: yihwwa' 'alaha' d'ebrayi' qam shadery lkeslwk: bi'mara': shader lṭayepy wpalḥy 'ely gaw barya': wha': la' shme'lwk hal d'aha'.
hatka' bi'mara' yli' yihwwa': b'aha' bet yad'et d'ana' ywen yihwwa': ha': 'ana' bet maḥen bḥwṭra' dyli' b'ydy 'al mya' dyna' gaw nahra': wbet payshy mwderi' ldema'.
wnwna' dyla' gaw nahra' bet mayta': wbet ḥameq nahra': wbet gangezy meṣrayi' leshtaya' mya' mn nahra'.

w'meri' marya' lmwshi': 'mwr l'ahrwn: shqwl ḥwṭrwk: wpasheṭ 'ydwk 'al mya' dmeṣriyn: 'al nahrawatay: 'al shaqyatay: w'al gawlawatay: w'al klay qawbyi' dmyay: whawy dema'. whawi' dema' gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: wbma'ni' dqaysi' dbma'ni' dki'pi'.

w'bedlwn hatka' mwshi' w'ahrwn: da'ky dpqedli' marya': wmwremli' bḥwṭra': wshḥili' lmya' dyhwaw gaw nahra' qam 'ayni' dper'wn wqam 'ayni' drigawatwhy: wpeshlwn mwderi' klay mya' dyhwaw gaw nahra' ldema':
wnwna' dyhwa' gaw nahra' metla': wḥmeqli' nahra': wla' mṣilwn meṣrayi' leshtaya' mya' mn nahra'. whwili' dema' gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
w'bedlwn hatka' remeldari' dmeṣriyn bḥershay: wqshili' lebih dper'wn wla' shme'li' 'elay: da'ky dhwmzemli' marya'.
wderi' per'wn w'tili' lbaytwhy: wla' mwtebli' lebwhy 'wp l'aha'.
wḥperwn klay meṣrayi' ḥaderwani' dnahra' mya' leshtaya': sabab dla' mṣilwn leshtaya' mn mya' dnahra'.
wpeshlwn twmemi' shab'a' ywmani' batr dmḥili' marya' lnahra'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': 'wwr lkes per'wn: w'amret 'elih: hatka' bi'mara' yli' marya': shader lṭayepy dpalḥy 'ely.
w'en maḥpelet 'ant lshadwri': ha': 'ana' bet maḥen lkl teḥwbwk bpeqaqi':
wbet mashreṣ nahra' peqaqi': wbet 'asqy wbet 'awry gaw baytwk: wgaw 'awtag ddmakwk: w'al shwytwk: wgaw bayta' drigawatwk: wgaw ṭayepwk: wgaw tanwrwk: wgaw gepnatwk:
wbywk: wbṭayepwk: wbklay rigawatwk: bet 'asqy peqaqi'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': 'mwr l'ahrwn: pasheṭ 'ydwk bḥwṭrwk 'al nahrawati': 'al shaqyati': w'al gawlawati': wma'seq peqaqi' 'al 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wpwsheṭli' 'ahrwn 'ydwhy 'al mya' dmeṣriyn: w'seqla' peqa' wkwsila' l'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
w'bedlwn hatka' remeldari' bḥershay: wmw'seqlwn peqaqi' 'al 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wqrili' per'wn lmwshi' wl'ahrwn: w'meri': parpelwn byihwwa' wma'ber peqaqi' meny wmn ṭayepy: wbet shadren lṭayepa': w'abdy debḥa' lyihwwa'.
w'meri' mwshi' lper'wn: 'yqarwk paqed 'aly: l'yman parpelen bwt dywk wbwt rigawatwk wbwt ṭayepwk: leqṭa'ya' peqaqi' menwk: wmn batwk: 'aḥky bnahra' payshy:
w'meri': lqaydamta'. w'meri': 'ayk ḥabrwk: qa' dyad'et dlayt 'ayk yihwwa' 'alahan.
wbet parqy peqaqi' menwk: wmn batwk: wmn rigawatwk: wmn ṭayepwk: 'aḥky bnahra' bet payshy.
wpleṭlwn mwshi' w'ahrwn mn lkes per'wn: wmwqweḥli' mwshi' lmarya': bwt hagt dpeqaqi' dmw'ya' hwa' 'al per'wn.
w'bedli' marya' 'ayk ḥabra' dmwshi': wmetlwn peqaqi' mn bati': mn darati': wmn ḥaqlani'.
wgwme'yaylwn qwḥi' qwḥi': wḥmeqla' 'ar'a'.
wḥzili' per'wn dhwila' rwaḥany: wywqreni' llebwhy: wla' shme'li' 'elay: da'ky dhwmzemli' marya'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': 'mwr l'ahrwn: pasheṭ ḥwṭrwk wmḥy l'apra' d'ar'a': whawi' lqalma' gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
w'bedlwn hatka': wpwsheṭli' 'ahrwn 'ydwhy bḥwṭrwhy: wmḥili' l'apra' d'ar'a': whwila' qalma' bbarnasha' wbhaywan: klih 'apra' d'ar'a' hwili' qalma' gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
w'bedlwn hatka' remeldari' bḥershay lpalwṭi' lqalma': wla' mṣilwn. whwila' qalma' bbarnasha' wbhaywan.
w'merwn remeldari' lper'wn: ṣb'a' d'alaha' yla': wqshili' lebih dper'wn: wla' shme'li' 'elay: da'ky dhwmzemli' marya'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': qadem bṣapra' wkly qam per'wn. ha': beplaṭa' yli' lmya': w'amret 'elih: hatka' bi'mara' yli' yihwwa': shader lṭayepy dpalḥy 'ely.
sabab d'en la' shadret lṭayepy: ha': 'ana' bet shadren 'alwk: w'al rigawatwk: w'al ṭayepwk: wgaw batwk: debwrta': wbet maly bati' dmeṣrayi' debwrta': w'wp 'ar'a' d'any 'alwh yna'.
wbet parshen bhw ywma' l'ar'a' dgishan: dṭayepy kelya' yli' 'alwh: dla' hawya' tama' debwrta': qa' dyad'et d'ana' ywen yihwwa' bgawa' d'ar'a'.
wbet matben pwrshwnya' biyl ṭayepy: wbiyl ṭayepwk: lqaydamta' bet hawi' 'aha' nyshanqa'.
w'bedli' marya' hatka': w'tila' debwrta' zarbanta' lbayta' dper'wn: wlbayta' drigawatwhy: wgaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn. ḥrebla' 'ar'a' mn qam debwrta'.
wqrili' per'wn lmwshi' wla'hrwn: w'meri': zimwn 'bwdwn debḥa' l'alahawkwn b'ar'a'.
w'meri' mwshi': li' ḥashḥa' le'bada' hatka': sabab dṭam'wta' dmeṣrayi' bet 'abdak debḥa' lyihwwa' 'alahan. ha': 'abdak debḥa' ṭam'wta' dmeṣrayi' qam 'aynay: wli' ragmy lan:
'wrḥa' dṭla' ywmani' bet 'azalk gaw barya': w'abdak debḥa' lyihwwa' 'alahan: da'ky d'amer 'elan.
w'meri' per'wn: 'ana' bet shadrenawkwn: w'abdytwn debḥa' lyihwwa' 'alahawkwn gaw barya': 'aḥky marḥwqi' la' marḥeqytwn li'zala'. parpelwn bwt dyy.

w'meri' mwshi': ha': 'ana' beplaṭa' ywen mn lkeslwk: wbet parpelen byihwwa' dparqa' debwrta' mn per'wn: wmn rigawatwhy: wmn ṭayepwhy: qaydamta'. 'aḥky la' mazyed per'wn le'bada' li'ba' dla' shader lṭayepa': le'bada' debḥa' lyihwwa'.
wpleṭli' mwshi' mn lkes per'wn: wpwrpeli' bmarya'.
w'bedli' marya' 'ayk ḥabra' dmwshi': wmw'beri' debwrta' mn per'wn: mn rigawatwhy: wmn ṭayepwhy: la' peshla' shbypta' ḥda'.
wmwḥle'mli' per'wn llebwhy: 'wp b'aha' gaha': wla' shwderi' lṭayepa'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': 'wwr lkes per'wn: whamzemet 'amih: hatka' bi'mara' yli' yihwwa' 'alaha' d'ebrayi': shader lṭayepy dpalḥy 'ely.
sabab d'en maḥpelet 'ant lshadwri': wmedri' 'ant dabqet lhwn:
ha': 'yda' dyihwwa' bet hawya' bqenyanwk dgaw deshta': bswsawati': bḥmari': bgwmli': btawri': wb'erbi': mawtana' yaqwra' raba'.
wbe' paresh yihwwa' biyl qenyana' dysrayil wbiyl qenyana' dmeṣriyn. wli' mayet mn kl dyli' dbnay ysrayil mendy.
wmwtebli' marya' wa'da': bi'mara': qaydamta' bet 'abed marya' 'aha' shwla' b'ar'a'.
w'bedli' marya' 'aha' shwla' bqaydamta': wmetli' klih qenyana' dmeṣriyn. wmn qenyana' dbnay ysrayil la' metli' ḥa'.
wshwderi' per'wn: wha': la' metli' mn qenyana' dysrayil hal ḥa': wḥlemli' lebih dper'wn: wla' shwderi' lṭayepa'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi' wla'hrwn: shqwlwn lawkwn melya' qṭyrawkwn qeṭma' d'atwna': wdari' lih mwshi' lashmaya' qam 'ayni' dper'wn:
wbet hawi' ltawz 'al klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: wbet hawi' 'al barnasha' w'al haywan shwḥna' beplaṭa' bmwshri': bklah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wshqelwn lqeṭma' d'atwna': wklilwn qam per'wn: wdwrilih mwshi' lashmaya': whwili' shwḥna' dbmwshri' beplaṭa' bbarnasha' wbhaywan.
wla' mṣilwn remeldari' leklaya' qam mwshi' mn qam shwḥna': sabab dhwili' shwḥna' bremeldari': wbklay meṣrayi'.
wmwqshili' marya' llebih dper'wn: wla' shme'li' 'elay: da'ky dhwmzemli' marya' 'am mwshi'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': qadem bṣapra': wkly qam per'wn: w'amret 'elih: hatka' bi'mara' yli' yihwwa' 'alaha' d'ebrayi': shader lṭayepy dpalḥy 'ely.
sabab dba'ha' gaha' 'ana' shadwri' ywen klay maḥwaty 'al lebwk: w'al rigawatwk: w'al ṭayepwk: qa' dyad'et dlayt 'ayk dyy gaw klah 'ar'a'.
sabab d'adya' bet hawen hwa' pwshṭa' 'ydy wmeḥya' 'elwk: wlṭayepwk bmawtana': whawet hwa' twlqa' mn 'ar'a'.
wmeged sabab d'aha' mwqemwk ywen: qa' dmaḥzen hwa' lwk ḥayly: wlhaqwwi' shemy gaw klah 'ar'a'.
medri' beklaya' ywet ldarqwl dṭayepy: la' lshadwray:
ha': 'ana' bet ma'ren: 'ayk d'aha' 'dana' qaydamta': barda' zarbana' raba': dla' hwili' 'ayk dyih gaw meṣriyn mn ywma' dpeshla' mwtebta' bbenyat: whal 'adya'.
w'adya' shader ma'req lqenyanwk: wlkl d'yt lwk gaw deshta'. kl barnasha' whaywan dpayesh mwkḥa' gaw deshta': wla' payesh gwm'ya' lbayta': bet ṣali' 'alay barda': wbet mayty.
hw dzde'li' mn ḥabrih dmarya': mn rigawati' dper'wn: mw'reqli' lrigawatwhy wlqenyanwhy lbayti'.
whw dla' mwtebli' lebwhy lḥabrih dmarya' shbeqli' lrigawatwhy wlqenyanwhy gaw deshta'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': pasheṭ 'ydwk lashmaya': whawi' barda' bklah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: 'al barnasha': w'al haywan: w'al klih gela' ddeshta' b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wpwsheṭli' mwshi' ḥwṭrwhy lashmaya': wmarya' yehbeli' ra'mi' wbarda': wḥderi' nwra' 'al 'ar'a': wmw'rili' marya' barda' 'al 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
whwili' barda': wnwra' ḥbyṭa' bgawa' dbarda' zarbana' raba': dla' hwili' 'ayk dyih gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn mn 'ayga' dhwila' lmelat.
wmḥili' barda' gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: lkl dyhwa' gaw deshta': mn barnasha' whal haywan: wlklih gela' ddeshta' mḥili' barda': wlkl 'ylana' ddeshta' shmeṭli'.
'aḥky b'ar'a' dgishan: dtama' hwaw bnay ysrayil: la' hwili' barda'.
wshwderi' per'wn wqrili' lmwshi' wla'hrwn: w'meri' 'elay: ḥṭily 'aha' gaha': yihwwa' zadyqa' yli': w'ana' wṭayepy byshi'.
parpelwn byihwwa': sabab draba' yla' hwayta' dra'mi' d'alaha' wbarda': wbet shadrenawkwn: wla' mazyedytwn leklaya'.
w'meri' 'elih mwshi': kad palṭen mn mdynta' bet parsen 'ydaty layihwwa': ra'mi' bet shaly: wbarda' li' hawi' medri': qa' dyad'et dlyihwwa' yla' 'ar'a'.
w'ant wrigawatwk ki' yad'en dhish li' zad'ytwn mn qam yihwwa' 'alaha'.
wqeṭw wsa'ri' peshlwn meḥyi': sabab dsa'ri' bbwla' hwaw: wqeṭw pqyḥta' hwa'.
wḥeṭi' wshelel la' peshlwn meḥyi': sabab dsiwdi' hwaw.
wpleṭli' mwshi' mn lkes per'wn: mn mdynta': wpresli' 'ydatwhy lamarya': wshlilwn ra'mi' wbarda': wmeṭra' la' peshla' twpeḥta' 'al 'ar'a'.
wḥzili' per'wn dshlila' meṭra': wbarda': wra'mi': wmwzyedli' leḥṭaya': wmwḥle'mli' llebwhy: hw wrigawatwhy.
wqshili' lebih dper'wn wla' shwderi' lbnay ysrayil: da'ky dhwmzemli' marya' byed mwshi'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': 'wwr lkes per'wn: sabab d'ana' mwḥle'mly llebwhy wlleba' drigawatwhy: qa' d'abden hwa' 'ani' nyshanqy gaway:
wqa' dhaqet bnatyati' dbrwnwk: wdbrwna' dbrwnwk: mendy dplyḥa' ywen bmeṣray': wnyshanqy d'byda' ywen gaway: wyad'ytwn d'ana' ywen yihwwa'.
w'tilwn mwshi' w'ahrwn lkes per'wn: w'merwn 'elih: hatka' bi'mara' yli' yihwwa' 'alaha' d'ebrayi': hal 'yman maḥpelet lmakwpi' ganwk mn qamy: shader lṭayepy dpalḥy 'ely.
sabab d'en maḥpelet 'ant lshadwri' lṭayepy: ha' 'ana' ma'wi' ywen qaydamta' qamṣa' bteḥwbwk:

wbet kasi' lpata' d'ar'a': wli' maṣi' ('nasha') leḥzaya' l'ar'a': wbet 'akel lsama' pysha' dhw dyhwa' ḥlyṣa': dpysha' yli' 'elawkwn mn barda': wbet 'akel lkl 'ylana' dmagywni' yli' 'elawkwn mn deshta'.
wbet maly batwk: wbati' dklay rigawatwk: wbati' dklay meṣrayi': hw dla' ḥzilwn babawatwk: wbabawati' dbabawatwk: mn ywma' dhwilwn 'al 'ar'a' hal d'aha' ywma'. wderi' wpleṭli' mn lkes per'wn.
w'merwn rigawati' dper'wn 'elih: hal 'yman bet hawi' 'aha' 'elan lqwlta': shader l'ani' 'nashi': wpalḥy lmarya' 'alahay: hish li' ywet byda'ya' dḥrebla' meṣriyn:
wpeshlwn mwderi' mwshi' w'ahrwn lkes per'wn: w'meri' 'elay: zimwn plwḥwn lyihwwa' 'alahawkwn: mn wmn bi'zala' yna':
w'meri' mwshi': bgwanqan wbsaban bet 'azalk: bbnwnan wbbnatan: bpesqan wbbeqratan bet 'azalk: sabab d'i'da' dyihwwa' yli' 'elan.
w'meri' 'elay: hawi' hatka' marya' 'amawkwn: da'ky dshadren 'elawkwn wlyalwdawkwn. ḥzimwn: sabab dbyshta' 'yt qam patawkwn.
la' hatka': di' zimwn gabri': wplwḥwn lyihwwa': sabab d'aha' ṭleblawkwn. wṭrydaylwn mn qam per'wn.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': pasheṭ 'ydwk 'al 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn bwt qamṣa': w'aseq 'al 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: w'akel lklih gela' d'ar'a': lkl dshbeqli' barda'.
wpwsheṭli' mwshi' ḥwṭrwhy 'al 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: wmarya' mw'yili' pawḥa' dmadnḥa' b'ar'a': klih hw 'ymama' wklih layli'. mawrisha' hwila': wpawḥa' dmadnḥa' mw'yili' lqamṣa'.
w'seqli' qamṣa' 'al klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: wshrili' bkl teḥwb dmeṣriyn: zarbana' raba'. qamwhy la' hwili' hatka' qamṣa' 'yk dhw: wbatrih li' hawi' hatka'.

wkwsili' lpata' dklah 'ar'a': wḥwila' 'ar'a': w'keli' lklih gela' d'ar'a': wlklah ṭ'wnta' d'ylana' dshbyqa' hwa' barda': wla' peshla' shbyqta' hek qynwta' b'ylana': wbgela' ddeshta': gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wmwlyezli' per'wn leqraya' lmwshi' wla'hrwn: w'meri': ḥṭily 'al yihwwa' 'alahawkwn w'alawkwn.
w'adya' di' shbwq ḥṭyty: 'aḥky 'aha' gaha': wparpelwn byihwwa' 'alahawkwn: wma'ber m'aly 'aḥky 'aha' mawta'.
wpleṭli' mn lkes per'wn: wpwrpeli' bmarya'.
wmwderi' marya' pawḥa' dma'rba': ḥaylana' raba': wshqeli' lqamṣa': wqam maḥi' lih gaw yama' dswp. la' peshli' shbyqa' ḥa' qamṣa': gaw kl teḥwb dmeṣriyn.
wmwqshili' marya' llebih dper'wn: wla' shwderi' lbnay ysrayil.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': pasheṭ 'ydwk lashmaya': whawi' ḥeshka' 'al 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: wpaltesh ('nasha') ḥeshka'.
wpwsheṭli' mwshi' 'ydwhy lashmaya': whwili' ḥwya' ḥeshkana' gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: ṭla' ywmani'.
la' ḥzilwn 'nasha' l'aḥwnwhy: wla' qemlwn 'nasha' mn dwktwhy: ṭla' ywmani'. wlklay bnay ysrayil hwili' bahra' gaw maskanay.
wqrili' per'wn lmwshi': w'meri': zimwn plwḥwn lyihwwa': 'aḥky pesqawkwn wbeqratawkwn payshy shbyqi': 'wp yalwdawkwn 'azly 'amawkwn.
w'meri' mwshi': 'wp 'ant yahbet b'ydan debḥi': wdebḥi' mwqdi': w'abdak lyihwwa' 'alahan.
w'wp qenyanan bet 'azel 'aman: li' paysha' shbyqta' sema': sabab dmenih bet shaqlak leplaḥa' lyihwwa' 'alahan: w'aḥnan li' yad'ak mwdy bet palḥak lyihwwa': hal dmaṭak tama'.
wmwqshili' marya' llebih dper'wn: wla' be'li' lshadwray.
w'meri' 'elih per'wn: zi' mn lkesly: hwy heshyar 'ant: la' mazyedet leḥzaya' paty: sabab dbywma' dḥazet paty: bet maytet.
w'meri' mwshi': ṣpayy hwmzemlwk: li' mazyeden medri' leḥzaya' patwk.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': medri' ḥda' mḥwta' bet ma'yen 'al per'wn: w'al meṣriyn: batr hada' bet shaderawkwn m'aka': hy 'dana' dshader: tamam meṭrada' bet ṭaredlawkwn m'aka'.
'dya' hamzem bnatyati' dṭayepa': wṭalby 'nasha' mn shbabwhy: wbakta' mn shbabtwh: ma'ni' dse'ma': wma'ni' ddahba'.
wyehbeli' marya' shapaqat lṭayepa' b'ayni' dmeṣrayi'. 'wp 'nasha' mwshi' gwra' hwa' raba' b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: b'ayni' drigawati' dper'wn: wb'ayni' dṭayepa'.
w'meri' mwshi': hatka' bi'mara' yli' marya': 'ayk palga' dlayli' 'ana' bet palṭen bgawa' dmeṣriyn:
wbet mayet kl bwkra' gaw 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: mn bwkrih dper'wn ytbana' 'al kwrsywhy: hal bwkrih dḥidamta' dyla' batr garwsta': wkl bwkra' dhaywani'.
wbet hawya' maqwaḥta' gwrta' gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: d'ayk dhy la' hwila': w'ayk dhy li' hawya' medri'.
wlkl bnay ysrayil li' maḥrep kalba' leshanwhy: lḥa' mn 'nasha' whal haywan: qa' dyad'ytwn dpreshli' yihwwa' biyl meṣrayi' wbiyl ysrayil.
wbet ṣaly klay 'ani' rigawatwk lkesly: wmakepy ganay 'ely: bi'mara': plwṭ 'ant wklih ṭayepa' dyna' b'aqlwk: wbatr hada' bet palṭen. wpleṭli' mn lkes per'wn bḥymta' dkarba'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': li' shame' 'elawkwn per'wn: qa' dzaydy 'agebwyaty b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wmwshi' w'ahrwn 'bedlwn lklay 'ani' 'agebwyati' qam per'wn: wmwqshili' marya' llebih dper'wn: wla' shwderi' lbnay ysrayil mn 'ar'why.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi' wla'hrwn: b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: bi'mara':
'aha' yarḥa' hawi' 'elawkwn risha' dyarḥi': qadmaya' yli' 'elawkwn lyarḥi' dshinta'.
hamzemwn 'am klah gama'at dysrayil: bi'mara': b'esra' b'aha' yarḥa' shaqly lawkwn 'nasha' pi'ra' lbayta' dbabawati': pi'ra' lbayta'.
w'en ḥaka' yli' bayta' mn dhawi' ḥa' pi'ra': 'ayga' shaqel hw wshbabwhy dqwrba' lbaytwhy: bmenyana' dganati': 'nasha' lqadra' d'kalwhy ḥashbenytwn 'al pi'ra'.
pi'ra' dla' laka': 'wrza' bar shinta': hawi' 'elawkwn: mn wa'ni' wmn 'ezi' shaqlytwn.
whawi' 'elawkwn lnṭarta': hal ywma' d'arba'sar l'aha' yarḥa': wparmy lih klih kensha' dgama'at dysrayil: bbiyt ramshi'.
wshaqly mn dema' wmatby 'al terway shypani': w'al saradar: 'al batwati' d'akly lih gaway.
w'akly lbesra' b'aha' layli': ṭwya' bnwra': wpaṭyri': byarqi' maryri' 'akly lih.
la' 'aklytwn menih naya': wbwshla': bwshla' bmya': 'ela' ṭwya' bnwra': rishwhy 'am 'aqlwhy w'am gawwhy.
wla' shabqytwn menih hal ṣapra'. whw dpayesh zawda' menih hal ṣapra': bnwra' maqdytwn.
whatka' 'aklytwn lih: ḥaṣawkwn 'syri': ṣawlawkwn b'aqlawkwn: wḥwṭrawkwn b'ydawkwn: w'aklytwn lih bmalyazta'. peṣḥa' yli' lmarya'.
wbet 'abren b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn b'aha' layli': wbet maḥen kl bwkra' b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: mn barnasha' whal haywan: wbklay 'alahi' dmeṣrayi' bet 'abden dywani': 'ana' yihwwa'.
whawi' dema' 'elawkwn lnyshanqa': 'al batwati' d'aḥtwn tama' ytwn: wbet ḥazen ldema' wbet 'abren m'alawkwn: wli' hawya' gawawkwn mḥwta' ltalwqi': kad maḥen b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
whawi' 'aha' ywma' 'elawkwn ltkara': w'abdytwn lih 'i'da': 'i'da' lmarya': ldawrawkwn: qanwna' d'alam 'abdytwn lih 'i'da'.
shab'a' ywmani' paṭyri' 'aklytwn: har bywma' qadmaya' baṭlytwn ḥmyra' mn batawkwn: sabab dkl d'akel ḥem'ya': paysha' qṭ'yta' hy gana' mn ysrayil: mn ywma' qadmaya' hal ywma' dshab'a'.
wbywma' qadmaya': gma'yta' qadyshta': wbywma' dshab'a': gma'yta' qadyshta' hawya' 'elawkwn. kl pwlḥana' la' payesh 'byda' byay: 'ela' hw dpayesh 'kyla' lkl gana': hw bnapshwhy payesh 'byda' 'elawkwn.
wnaṭrytwn (l'i'da') dpaṭyri': sabab dhar b'aha' ywma' pwleṭly lḥaylawatawkwn mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: wnaṭrytwn l'aha' ywma' ldawrawkwn: qanwna' d'alam.
byarḥa' qadmaya': bywma' d'arba'sar lyarḥa': bramsha': 'aklytwn paṭyri': hal ywma' d'esry wḥa' lyarḥa': bramsha'.
shab'a' ywmani' ḥmyra' la' payesh mwkḥa' gaw batawkwn: sabab dkl d'akel mwḥme'ya': payesha' qṭ'yta' hy gana' mn gama'at dysrayil: bmashaḥaṭ wbhwya' d'atra'.
kl mwḥme'ya' la' 'aklytwn: bklay maskanawkwn 'aklytwn paṭyri'.
wqrili' mwshi' lklay ḥwardeqni' dysrayil: w'meri' 'elay: dbwqwn wshqwlwn lawkwn ḥa' 'erba': l'wggawkwn: wprwmwn peṣḥa'.
wshaqlytwn dasta' dzwapa' wṭamshytwn bdema' dyli' bma'na': wmaḥytwn 'al saradar: w'al terway shypani' mn dema' dyli' bma'na': w'aḥtwn la' palṭytwn 'nasha' mn tar'a' dbaytwhy: hal ṣapra'.
wbet 'aber marya' lemḥaya' lmeṣrayi': wbet ḥazi' ldema' 'al saradar w'al terway shypani': wbet 'aber marya' m'al tar'a': wli' shabeq ltalqana' li'taya' gaw batawkwn lemḥaya'.
wnaṭrytwn 'aha' shwla': lqanwna' 'elwk wlbnwnwk hal 'alam.
whawya': 'yman d'atytwn l'ar'a' dbet yahbel marya' 'elawkwn: da'ky dhwmzemli': 'ayga' naṭrytwn 'aha' ḥelmat.
whawya': kad 'amry 'elawkwn bnwnawkwn: mwdy yli' 'aha' ḥelmat 'elawkwn:
'ayga' 'amrytwn: debḥa' dpeṣḥa' yli' lmarya': d'beri' m'al bati' dbnay ysrayil gaw meṣriyn: hy 'dana' dmḥili' lmeṣrayi': wlbati' dyen pwṣili'. wkeplwn ṭayepa' wsgedlwn.
w'zelwn w'bedlwn bnay ysrayil da'ky dpqedli' marya' lmwshi' wla'hrwn: hatka' 'bedlwn.
whwila' bpalgih dlayli': wmarya' mḥili' kl bwkra' gaw 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: mn bwkrih dper'wn yatbana' 'al kwrsywhy: hal bwkra' dyaḥsyr dyhwa' gaw dwsaḥana': wkl bwkra' whaywan.
wqemli' per'wn bhw layli': hw wklay rigawatwhy: wklay meṣrayi': whwila' maqwaḥta' gwrta' gaw meṣriyn: sabab dlayt hwa' bayta' dlayt hwa' tama' myta'.
wqrili' lmwshi' wla'hrwn blayli': w'meri': qwmwn plwṭwn mn gawa' dṭayepy: 'wp 'aḥtwn 'wp bnay ysrayil: wzimwn plwḥwn lyihwwa': 'ayk dhwmzemlawkwn.
'wp pesqawkwn 'wp beqratawkwn shqwlwn: d'aky dhwmzemlawkwn: wzimwn: wbarkytwn 'wp 'ely.
wzwrbenwn meṣrayi' 'al ṭayepa': lmalywzi' lshadwray mn 'ar'a': sabab d'merwn: klan myti' ywak.
wshqeli' ṭayepa' layshwhy: mn qam dḥme'li': gepnatay 'syri' gaw gwlay 'al rw'shay.
wbnay ysrayil 'bedlwn 'ayk ḥabrih dmwshi': wṭleblwn mn meṣrayi' ma'ni' dsi'ma': wma'ni' ddahba': wgwli'.
wmarya' yehbeli' shapaqat lṭayepa' b'ayni' dmeṣrayi': wyehbelwn 'elay mendy dṭleblwn. wsleblwn lmeṣrayi'.
wkweklwn bnay ysrayil mn ra'msys lsakwt: 'ayk 'eshta' ma'' 'alpi' rigali': gabri': shbwq mn yalwdi'.
w'wp ḥbyṭi' raba' 'seqlwn 'amay: wpesqi' wbeqrati': wqenyana' raba' kem.
wypilwn laysha' dpwlṭi' hwaw mn meṣriyn: gerdayi' paṭyri': sabab dli' hwa' ḥem'ya': sabab dpeshlwn ṭrydi' mn meṣriyn: wla' mṣilwn l'arqwli': w'wp zwadi' la' 'bedlwn qatay.
wytyabta' dbnay ysrayil: dyteblwn gaw meṣriyn: 'arba'ma'' wtlayy sheni' hwa'.
whwila' bḥarta' d'arba'ma'' wtlayy sheni': whwila' har b'aha' ywma': pleṭlwn klay ḥaylawati' dmarya' mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
layli' dnṭarta' yli' lmarya': bwt palaṭtay mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn. 'aha' yli' hw layli' dmarya' dpayesh nṭyra': qa' klay bnay ysrayil: ldawray.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi' w'ahrwn: 'aha' yli' qanwna' dpeṣḥa'. kl bar nwkraya' la' 'akel menih.
wkl riga' d'nasha' zbyna' dzwza': gazret lih: 'ayga' 'akel menih.
mashaḥaṭ wdbyqa' bhaqa' la' 'akel menih.
bḥa' bayta' payesh 'kyla': la' palṭet mn bayta' mn besra' lbadar: wgarma' la' tabrytwn byih.
klah gama'at dysrayil 'abdy lih.
wkad mashḥeṭ 'amwk ḥa' mashaḥaṭ: w'abed peṣḥa' lmarya': payesh gzyra' 'elih kl 'wrza': w'ayga' qarben le'badwhy: whawi' 'ayk hwya' d'atra'. wkl 'wrla' la' 'akel menih.
ḥa' namwsa' hawi' lhwya' d'atra': wlmashaḥaṭ dmashḥeṭ gawawkwn.
w'bedlwn klay bnay ysrayil da'ky dpqedli' marya' lmwshi' wla'hrwn: hatka' 'bedlwn.
whwila' har b'aha' ywma' pwleṭli' marya' lbnay ysrayil mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn bḥaylawatay.
whwmzemli' marya' 'am mwshi': bi'mara':
qadesh 'ely kl bwkra': patḥana' dkl marb'a' gaw bnay ysrayil: bbarnasha' wbhaywan: dyy yli'.
w'meri' mwshi' lṭayepa': tkwr l'aha' ywma' dpleṭlawkwn mn meṣriyn: mn biyt rigwta': sabab dbzarb d'yda' qam paleṭ lawkwn marya' m'aka'. wla' payesh 'kyla' ḥem'ya'.
'aha' ywma' pleṭlawkwn: byarḥa' 'abyb.

wbet hawya': 'yman dma'werwk marya' l'ar'a' dkna'naya': wḥiytaya': w'amwraya': wḥawaya': wyabwsaya': dymili' l'abahatwk lyahba' 'elwk: 'ar'a' magryanta' dḥalba' wdebsha': 'ayga' 'abdet 'aha' ḥelmat b'aha' yarḥa'.
shab'a' ywmani' 'aklet paṭyri': wywma' dshab'a' 'i'da' hawi' lmarya'.
paṭyra' payesh 'kyla' shab'a' ywmani': wla' payesh ḥezya' lkeslwk ḥem'ya': wla' payesh ḥezya' lkeslwk ḥmyra' bkl teḥwbwk.
wmad'et lbrwnwk bhw ywma': bi'mara': sabab dhy d'bedli' marya' 'ely bplaṭty mn meṣriyn.
whawya' 'elwk lnyshanqa' 'al 'ydwk: wltkara' biyl 'aynwk: qa' dhawi' namwsih dmarya' bpwmwk: sabab db'yda' zarbanta' qam paleṭ lwk marya' mn meṣriyn.
wnaṭret 'aha' qanwna' lwa'dwhy: mn ywmani' lywmani'.
whawya' 'yman dma'werwk marya' l'ar'a' dkna'naya': da'ky dymili' 'elwk wl'abahatwk: wyahbel lah 'elwk:
'ayga' ma'beret kl patḥana' dmarb'a' lmarya': wkl bwkra' za'ya' dhaywan dhawi' lwk: 'wrzi': lmarya'.
wkl bwkra' dḥmara' parqet bpi'ra': w'en la' parqet: 'ayga' tabret qdalwhy. wkl bwkra' dbarnasha' gaw bnwnwk parqet.
whawya': 'yman dbaqerwk brwnwk bzabna' d'ati': bi'mara': mwdy yla' 'aha': 'amret 'elih: bzarb d'yda' qam paleṭ lan marya' mn meṣriyn: mn biyt rigwta'.

whwila': d'bedli' qeshywta' per'wn mn lshadwran: wqṭeli' marya' kl bwkra' b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: mn bwkra' dbarnasha' whal bwkra' dhaywan. bwt d'aha' 'ana' be'bada' ywen debḥa' lmarya' kl patḥana' dmarb'a': 'wrzi': wkl bwkra' dbnwny bet parqen.
whawya' lnyshanqa' 'al 'ydwk: wlṭwṭapwt biyl 'aynwk: sabab dbzarb d'yda' qam paleṭ lan marya' mn meṣriyn.
whwila': kad shwderi' per'wn lṭayepa': la' lwblayli' 'alaha' b'wrḥa' d'ar'a' dpleshtayi': 'apin dqwrba' hwa': sabab d'meri' 'alaha': la' hwi' dpashem ṭayepa': kad ḥazy plasha': wdayry lmeṣriyn.
wmwḥderi' 'alaha' lṭayepa' b'wrḥa' dbarya' dyama' dswp. wzryzi' 'seqlwn bnay ysrayil: mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wshqeli' mwshi' lgarmi' dyawsep 'amih: sabab dma'mwwi' mw'mya' hwa' lbnay ysrayil: bi'mara': msaḥbwri' bet saḥberawkwn 'alaha': wma'sqytwn lgarmy m'aka' 'amawkwn.
wkweklwn mn sakwt: wshrilwn gaw 'atam: bmarza' dbarya'.
wmarya' bi'zala' hwa' qamay: b'ymama' bsṭwna' d'nana': ltagbwray b'wrḥa': wblayli' bsṭwta' dnwra': lbahrwni' 'alay: li'zala' b'ymama' wlayli'.
li' shani' hwa' sṭwna' d'nana' b'ymama': wsṭwna' dnwra' blayli': mn qam ṭayepa'.
whwmzemli' marya' 'am mwshi': bi'mara':
hamzem 'am bnay ysrayil: wdayry wshary qam py-haḥyrwt: biyl magdwl wbiyl yama': qam ba'al-ṣpwn: lbarqwlwh sharytwn 'al yama'.
wbet 'amer per'wn bahs dbnay ysrayil: shgyshi' yna' b'ar'a': dbyqa yli' barya'.
wbet maqshen llebih dper'wn: wbet napel batray: wbet payshen mywqra' bper'wn wbklih ḥaylwhy: wbet yad'y meṣrayi' d'ana' ywen marya'. w'bedlwn hatka'.
wpeshla' mwd'yta' lmalka' dmeṣriyn d'reqli' ṭayepa': wpeshli' mwdera' lebih dper'wn wdrigawatwhy 'al ṭayepa': w'merwn: 'aha' mwdy 'bedlan: dshwderan lysrayil mn leplaḥa' 'elan:
w'seri' kaleskwhy: wlṭayepwhy shqeli' 'amih.
wshqeli' 'eshta' ma'' kaleski' gwbyi': wklay kaleski' dmeṣriyn: wshaleshi' 'al klay.
wmwqshili' marya' llebih dper'wn malka' dmeṣriyn: wnpeli' batr bnay ysrayil: wbnay ysrayil pleṭlwn b'yda' ramta'.
wnpelwn meṣrayi' batray: klay swsawati': kaleski' dper'wn: wrakabwhy wḥaylwhy: wmeṭyaylwn sheryi' 'al yama' lkes py-haḥyrwt: qam ba'al-ṣpwn.
wper'wn qwrbeni': wmwremlwn bnay ysrayil 'aynay: wha': meṣrayi' bi'taya' batray: wzde'lwn raba': wmwqweḥlwn bnay ysrayil lmarya'.
w'merwn lmwshi': mn dlayt hwaw qabrawati' gaw meṣriyn qam lablet lan lemyata' gaw barya': 'aha' mwdy 'bedlwk 'elan: lpalwṭan mn meṣriyn:
ha' li' yli' 'aha' hw ḥabra' dhwmzemlan 'amwk gaw meṣriyn: bi'mara': pṣy menan wpalḥak lmeṣrayi': sabab dbwsh ṣpayy hwa' 'elan plaḥta' lmeṣrayi': mn myatan gaw barya'.
w'meri' mwshi' lṭayepa': la' zad'ytwn: klimwn wḥzimwn lpwrqanih dmarya': dbet 'abed 'elawkwn 'edyw ywma': sabab dda'ky dḥzilawkwn lmeṣrayi' 'edyw ywma': li' mazyedytwn leḥzayay medri' hal 'alam.
marya' bet palesh qatawkwn: w'aḥtwn hawytwn shtyqi'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': mwdy maqwwḥi' ywet 'ely: hamzem 'am bnay ysrayil wkawky.
w'ant marem ḥwṭrwk: wpasheṭ 'ydwk 'al yama': wpaly lah: w'awry bnay ysrayil bgawa' dyama' bberza'.
w'ana': ha': 'ana' bet maqshen lleba' dmeṣrayi': wbet 'aty batray: wbet payshen mywqra' bper'wn: wbklih ḥaylwhy: bkaleskwhy: wbrakbwhy.
wbet yad'y meṣrayi' d'ana' ywen marya': kad payshen mywqra' bper'wn: bkaleskwhy: wbrakabwhy.
wshwnili' mala'kih d'alaha' dbi'zala' hwa' qam 'wrdwy dysrayil: w'zeli' mn batray. wshwnili' sṭwna' d'nana' mn qamay: wklili' mn batray:
w'tili' biyl 'wrdwy dmeṣrayi' wbiyl 'wrdwy dysrayil: whwila' 'nana' wḥwya': wbwhreni' blayli'. wla' qwrbeni' 'aha' l'aha': klih layli'.
wpwsheṭli' mwshi' 'ydwhy 'al yama': wlwbeli' marya' lyama' bpawḥa' ḥaylana' dmadnḥa' klih hw layli': w'bedli' yama' lberza': wpeshlwn pwlyi' mya'.
w'werwn bnay ysrayil bgawa' dyama' bberza': wmya' 'elay shwra' hwaw: mn yamynay wmn semalay.
wnpelwn batray meṣrayi': w'tilwn batray klay swsawati' dper'wn: kaleskwhy: wrakabwhy: lgawa' dyama'.
whwila' bbdla' dmawrisha': wḥeri' marya' l'wrdwy dmeṣrayi' bsṭwna' dnwra' d'nana': wshgeshli' l'wrdwy dmeṣrayi'.
wpwleṭli' lkirḥi' dkaleskwhy: w'bedli' dṭary hwaw byaqwrwta': w'merwn meṣrayi': 'arqak mn qam ysrayil: sabab dmarya' beplasha' yli' qatay bmeṣrayi'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': pasheṭ 'ydwk 'al yama': wdayry mya' 'al meṣrayi': 'al kaleskay w'al rakabay.
wpwsheṭli' mwshi' 'ydwhy 'al yama': wdera' yama' bdyarta' dmawrisha' lqadrwh dhamasha': wmeṣrayi' 'reqlwn l'wrḥwh: wṭrepli' marya' lmeṣrayi' bgawa' dyama'.
wderwn mya' wkwsilwn lkaleski' wlrakabi': lklih ḥaylih dper'wn d'tya' hwa' batray gaw yama': la' peshli' shbyqa' byay hal ḥa'.
wbnay ysrayil ḥderwn bberza' bgawa' dyama': wmya' 'elay shwra' hwaw: mn yamynay wmn semalay.
wpwreqli' marya' bhw ywma' lysrayil mn 'yda' dmeṣrayi': wḥzili' ysrayil lmeṣrayi' myti' 'al septa' dyama'.
wḥzili' ysrayil 'yda' gwrta' d'bedli' marya' bmeṣrayi': wzde'lwn ṭayepa' mn marya': whwmenwn bmarya' wbmwshi' rigwhy.

'ayga' zmeri' mwshi' wbnay ysrayil 'aha' zmarta' lmarya': w'merwn: bi'mara':
bet zamren lmarya': sabab dmeryama' remli':
swsi' wrakbanwhy drili' byama'.

ḥayly wzmarty marya':
whwili' 'ely lpwrqana'.
'aha' yli' 'alahy: wbet shabḥenih:
'alahih dbaby: wbet marmenih.
marya' 'nasha' dplasha' yli': yihwwa' shemwhy.
kaleski' dper'wn wḥaylwhy drili' byama': wgwbyi' dshaleshwhy peshlwn ṭwbe'yi' byama' dswp.

thwmi' kwsyaylwn:
ṣlilwn l'wmqi' 'ayk ki'pa'.
yamynwk: ya' marya': peshla' shbyḥta' bḥayla'. yamynwk: ya' marya': ṭwḥṭeḥla' deshmen.

wbgwrwta' dramwtwk tleḥlwk lqaymani' darqwlwk:
shwderwk ḥemtwk: 'kylayla' 'ayk kwlash.

wbrwḥa' dpwqaqwk peshlwn mwklyi' 'ayk rwmta' mya':
klilwn 'ayk qwḥa' garyani':
qshilwn thwmi' bleba' dyama'.

'meri' deshmen: bet naplen batray:
bet maṭen: bet palen slabta': bet sab'a' menay gany: bet garshen saypy: bet maḥreba' lhwn 'ydy.

mḥilwk bpawḥwk: kwsyayla' yama':
ṭbe'lwn 'ayk qerqwshem bmya' zarbani'.

many yli' 'ayk dywk gaw 'alahi': ya' marya':
many 'ayk dywk shbyḥa' bqadyshwta':
sahmana' bteshbwḥyati': 'abdana' d'agebwti':

pwshaṭlwk yamynwk:
bel'yayla' 'ar'a'.

twgberwk bshapaqatwk 'aha' ṭayepa' dpwreqlwk:
twgberwk bḥaylwk lmaskan dqwdshwk.

shme'lwn ṭayepi': rgedlwn:
ṣaw dbyqayla' 'amrani' dplesht.

'ayga' r'elwn myri' d'adwm:
zarbani' dmw'ab dbyqayla' ratratta':
psherwn klay 'amrani' dkna'n.

bet napla' 'alay zdw'ta' wsahm:
bgwrwta' ddra'nwk bet hawy shtyqi' 'ayk ki'pa':
hal d'aber ṭayepwk: ya' marya':
hal d'aber 'aha' ṭayepa' dqnilwk.

bet ma'yet lhwn wnaṣbet lhwn bṭwra' dyartwtwk:
dwkta' qa' shraytwk twreṣlwk: ya' marya':
maqdsha': ya' mary: hwderwn 'ydatwk.
marya' bet 'abed malkwta' l'alam 'almyn.
sabab d'werwn swsawati' dper'wn bkaleskwhy wbrakabwhy gaw yama': wmwderi' marya' 'alay mya' dyama': wbnay ysrayil ḥderwn bberza' bgawa' dyama'.
wshqela' maryam nbyta': ḥatih d'ahrwn: tapa' b'ydwh: wpleṭlwn klay baktati' batrwh btapi' wbreqdi'.

wgwwebla' 'elay maryam:
zmwrwn lmarya': sabab dmeryama' remli':
swsi' wrakbanwhy drili' byama'.
wmwkwekli' mwshi' lysrayil mn yama' dswp: wpleṭlwn lbarya' dshwr: w'zelwn ṭla' ywmani' gaw barya': wla' mwkeḥlwn mya'.
w'tilwn lmwrat: wla' mṣilwn leshtaya' mya' mn mwrat: sabab dmaryri' hwaw. bwt d'aha': qrilwn shemwh: mwrat.
wṭwrṭemlwn ṭayepa' 'al mwshi': bi'mara': mwdy shatak:
wmwqweḥli' lmarya': wqam maḥzi' lih marya' 'ylana': wrwpili' gaw mya': wḥlilwn mya'. tama' mwtebli' qatih qanwna' wshar'at: wtama' qam greb lih.

w'meri': 'en meshma'ya' sham'et lqalih dmarya' 'alahwk: whw dyali' trwṣa' b'aynwhy 'abdet: wdabqet nata' lpwqdanwhy: wnaṭret klay qanwnwhy: kl dard dmwtebly bmeṣrayi' li' matben 'alwk: sabab d'ana' ywen marya' basmanwk.
w'tilwn l'ylem: wtama' 'yt hwaw tre'sar 'aynati' dmya': wshab'y 'ylani' dḥwrmi'. wshrilwn tama' 'al mya'.
wkweklwn mn 'ylem: w'tilwn klah gama'at dbnay ysrayil lbarya' dsyn: dyli' biyl 'ylem wbiyl synay: bywma' dḥamsha'sar lyarḥa' dtray lplaṭay mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wṭwrṭemlwn klah gama'at dbnay ysrayil 'al mwshi' w'al 'ahrwn gaw barya':

w'merwn 'elay bnay ysrayil: ṭwba' dhawak hwaw myti' b'ydih dmarya' gaw 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: kad ki' yatbak hwaw 'al maregla' dbesra': kad ki' 'aklak hwaw laḥma' lsba'ya': sabab dqam palṭytwn lan l'aha' barya': lmamywti' lklih 'aha' kensha' bkepna'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': ha': 'ana' ma'rwwi' ywen qatawkwn laḥma' mn shmaya': wpaleṭ ṭayepa' wgm'y qadra' dywma' bywmwhy: qa' dgarbenwn: 'en bet ḥadry bnamwsy: yan la'.
whawya' bywma' d'eshta': whadry lhw dma'yy: whawi' tray hada' 'al dhw dgm'y ywma' bywma'.
w'merwn mwshi' w'ahrwn lklay bnay ysrayil: bramsha': 'ayga' bet yad'ytwn dmarya' qam paleṭ lawkwn mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wbṣapra': 'ayga' bet ḥazytwn teshbwḥtih dmarya': sabab dshme'li' ṭarṭamyatawkwn 'al marya': w'aḥnan mwdy ywak dṭarṭemytwn 'alan:

w'meri' mwshi': ('aha' bet hawya') 'yman dyahbel marya' 'elawkwn bramsha' besra' li'kala': wlaḥma' bṣapra' lesba'ya': bhy dshme'li' marya' ṭarṭamyatawkwn d'aḥtwn ṭarṭwmi' ytwn 'alwhy: w'aḥnan mwdy ywak: li' yna' 'alan ṭarṭamyatawkwn: 'yna' 'al marya'.
w'meri' mwshi' l'ahrwn: 'mwr lklah gama'at dbnay ysrayil: qarbenwn qam marya': sabab dshme'li' ṭarṭamyatawkwn.
whwila': kad hwmzemli' 'ahrwn 'am klah gama'at dbnay ysrayil: derwn labarya': wha': teshbwḥtih dmarya' peshla' ḥzyta' b'nana'.
whwmzemli' marya' 'am mwshi': bi'mara':
shme'ly ṭarṭamyati' dbnay ysrayil: hamzem 'amay: bi'mara': bbiyt ramshi' bet 'aklytwn besra': wbṣapra' bet sab'ytwn laḥma': wbet yad'ytwn d'ana' ywen marya' 'alahawkwn.
whwila' bramsha': w'seqlwn qwpshyni' wkwsilwn l'wrdwy: wbṣapra' hwila' ytyabta' dṭlwla' ḥaderwani' d'wrdwy.
w'seqla' ytyabta' dṭlwla': wha': 'al pata' dbarya' dayqa' qwlpa': dayqa' 'ayk selwr: 'al 'ar'a'.
wḥzilwn bnay ysrayil: w'merwn 'nasha' l'aḥwnwhy: man hw: sabab dla' yde'lwn mwdy hwa'. w'meri' mwshi' 'elay: 'aha' yli' laḥma' dyehbeli' marya' 'elawkwn qa' 'kala'.
'aha' yli' mendy dpqedli' marya': gme'mwn menih 'nasha' lqadra' d'kalwhy: 'wmer lrisha': menyana' dganatawkwn: 'nasha' qa' d'any dbmashknwhy shaqlytwn.
w'bedlwn hatka' bnay ysrayil: wgwme'lwn: ḥa' mazywdi' wḥa' mabṣwri'.
wkelwn b'wmir: wla' mwzyedli' mazyedana': wmabṣerana' la' ḥseri': 'nasha' lqadra' d'kalwhy gwme'lwn.
w'meri' mwshi' 'elay: 'nasha' la' mazyed menih hal ṣapra'.
wla' shme'lwn lmwshi': wmwzyedlwn 'nasha' menih hal ṣapra': wremli' tewel'i' wḥmeqli'. wkrebli' 'alay mwshi'.
wki' gm'y hwaw lih bṣapra' bṣapra': 'nasha' 'ayk qadra' d'kalwhy: wkad ḥayem hwa' shemsha' ki' pasher hwa'.
whwila': bywma' d'eshta': gwme'lwn laḥma' tray hada': tray 'wmiri' lḥa' ('nasha'): w'tilwn klay gwrani' dgama'at wmwde'lwn lmwshi'.
w'meri' 'elay: hw yli' dhwmzemli' marya': shabatwn shabat qadyshta' yla' lmarya' qaydamta': mendy dyapytwn ypimwn: wmendy dbashlytwn bashlwn: wkl dzayed matbwn lawkwn lnṭarta' hal ṣapra'.
wqam matby lih hal ṣapra': da'ky dpqedli' mwshi': wla' ḥmeqli': wtewel'a' la' hwila' byih.
w'meri' mwshi': 'kwlwn lih 'edyw ywma': sabab dshabat yla' 'edyw ywma': lmarya'. 'edyw ywma' li' makḥytwn lih bdeshta'.
'eshta' ywmani' bet gm'ytwn lih: wbywma' dshab'a' shabat yla': li' hawi' byih.
whwila' bywma' dshab'a': wpleṭlwn mn ṭayepa' lgm'wwi' wla' mwkeḥlwn.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': hal 'yman bet maḥpelytwn lenṭara' pwqdany wnamwsy:
ḥzimwn: sabab dmarya' yehbeli' 'elawkwn shabat: bwt d'aha' hw byahbawkwn yli' bywma' d'eshta' laḥma' dtray ywmani'. ytwbwn 'nasha' bdwktwhy: la' paleṭ 'nasha' mn dwktwhy: bywma' dshab'a'.
wneḥlwn ṭayepa' bywma' dshab'a'.
wqrilwn biyt ysrayil shemwhy: manna'. whw 'ayk barzar'a' dtawli' ḥwara' hwa': wṭa'mwhy 'ayk laḥma' raqyqa' bdebsha'.
w'meri' mwshi': 'aha' yli' ḥabra' dpqedli' marya': ḥa' 'wmer melya' menih payesh nṭyra' ldawrawkwn: qa' dḥazy llaḥma' dmw'kely 'elawkwn gaw barya': b'dana' dqam palṭenawkwn mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
w'meri' mwshi' l'ahrwn: shqwl ḥa' ma'na' wmateb gawwhy ḥa' 'wmer melya' manna': wmateb lih qam marya' qa' nṭarta' ldawrawkwn.
da'ky dpqedli' marya' lmwshi': hada' mwtebli' 'ahrwn qam sahdwta' lnṭarta'.
wbnay ysrayil 'kelwn manna' 'arb'y sheni': hal d'tilwn l'ar'a' 'abayy: manna' 'kelwn hal d'tilwn lmarza' d'ar'a' dkna'n.
w'wmer ḥa' 'syraya' d'ipa' yli'.
wkweklwn klah gama'at dbnay ysrayil mn barya' dsyn: lkwakyatay: bḥabrih dmarya': wshrilwn brpydym: wlayt hwaw mya' dshati' hwa' ṭayepa'.
wmwqreṣli' ṭayepa' 'am mwshi': w'merwn: hablwn lan mya' wshatak. w'meri' 'elay mwshi': qamwdy maqrwṣi' ytwn 'amy: qamwdy garwbi' ytwn lmarya':
wṣihli' tama' ṭayepa' lmya': wṭwrṭemli' ṭayepa' 'al mwshi': w'meri': 'aha' qamwdy qam ma'sqet lan mn meṣriyn lmamywti' 'elan wlbnwnan wlqenyanan bṣahwa':
wmwqweḥli' mwshi' lmarya': bi'mara': mwdy 'abden l'aha' ṭayepa': ḥaka' paysha' dragem hwa' ly.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': 'bwr qam ṭayepa': wshqwl 'amwk mn ḥwardeqni' dysrayil: wḥwṭrwk dmḥilwk byih lnahra' shqwl b'ydwk w'azelt.
ha': 'ana' bet kalen qamwk tama' 'al qaya' bḥwryb: wmaḥet bqaya': wbet palṭy menih mya': wshati' ṭayepa'. w'bedli' hatka' mwshi' qam 'ayni' dḥwardeqni' dysrayil.
wqrili' shema' dhy dwka': masa': wmryba': bwt maqraṣta' dbnay ysrayil: wsabab dgwreblwn lmarya': bi'mara': 'yt marya' bgawan: yan la':
w'tili' 'maliyq wpleshli' 'am ysrayil brpydym.
w'meri' mwshi' lyshw': gaby lan 'nashi': wplwṭ: plwsh 'am 'maliyq. qaydamta' 'ana' bet kalen 'al risha' drwmta': wḥwṭra' d'alaha' b'ydy.
w'bedli' yshw' da'ky d'meri' 'elih mwshi': leplasha' 'am 'maliyq. wmwshi': w'ahrwn: wḥwr: 'seqlwn 'al risha' drwmta'.
whwila': kad marem hwa' mwshi' 'ydwhy: zwrbeni' ysrayil: wkad manyeḥ hwa' 'ydwhy: zwrbeni' 'maliyq.
w'ydati' dmwshi' ywqrenwn: wshqelwn ki'pa' wmwteblwn tḥwtwhy wytebli' 'alwhy: w'ahrwn wḥwr snedlwn l'ydatwhy: ḥa' mn d'aha' giba' wḥa' mn dhw giba': whwilwn 'ydatwhy qwyi': hal gnaya' dshemsha'.
wtberi' yshw' l'maliyq wlṭayepwhy bpwma' dsaypa'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': ktwb 'aha' lmatkarta' bktaba': wmateb bnatyati' dyshw': sabab dmegrada' bet garden ltkarih d'maliyq mn tḥwt shmaya'.
wbnili' mwshi' madbḥa': wqrili' shemwhy: yihwwa'-nasy.
w'meri': sabab d'yda' 'al kwrsya' dmarya': plasha' lmarya' 'am 'maliyq mn dawra' ldawra'.
wshme'li' yatrwn: kahna' dmedyan: ḥemyanih dmwshi': kl d'bedli' 'alaha' lmwshi' wlysrayil ṭayepwhy: dpwleṭli' marya' lysrayil mn meṣriyn.
wshqeli' yatrwn: ḥemyanih dmwshi': lṣepwra' baktih dmwshi': batr dshwdrwh hwa':
wlterway bnwnwh: dshemih dḥa' gershwn: sabab d'meri': mashaḥaṭ hwily b'ar'a' nwkrayta':
wshemih dhw 'ḥirna': 'ily'azar: sabab d'alahih dbaby bhayarty: wpwṣyeni' mn saypih dper'wn.
w'tili' yatrwn: ḥemyanih dmwshi': wbnwnwhy wbaktwhy: lkes mwshi': lbarya' dhw sherya' hwa' tama': lṭwra' d'alaha'.
w'meri' lmwshi': 'ana' ḥemyanwk: yatrwn: 'tya' ywen lkeslwk: wbaktwk wterway bnwnwh 'amwh.
wpleṭli' mwshi' l'wrḥa' dḥemyanwhy: wmwkepali' ganwhy: wnsheqlih: wbwqerwn 'nasha' mn ḥabrwhy lshlama': w'werwn lmashkna'.
whwqili' mwshi' lḥemyanwhy kl d'bedli' marya' lper'wn wlmeṣrayi': bwt ḥater dysrayil: klih gapa' dmṭili' 'elay b'wrḥa': wpwṣyayli' marya'.
wḥdili' yatrwn 'al klah ṭabta' d'bedli' marya' lysrayil: dqam paṣi' lih mn 'yda' dmeṣrayi'.
w'meri' yatrwn: bryka' yli' marya' dqam paṣi' lawkwn mn 'yda' dmeṣrayi': wmn 'yda' dper'wn: dpwṣili' lṭayepa' mn tḥwt 'yda' dmeṣrayi'.
'adya' yde'ly dgwra' yli' marya' mn klay 'alahi': sabab dbmendy d'bedlwn zayarwta' 'alay.
wshqeli' yatrwn: ḥemyanih dmwshi': debḥa' mwqda' wdebḥi' l'alaha': w'tili' 'ahrwn wklay ḥwardeqni' dysrayil: li'kala' laḥma' 'am ḥemyanih dmwshi': qam 'alaha'.
whwila' bywma' dbatrih: wytebli' mwshi' ledyana' lṭayepa'. wklili' ṭayepa' lkes mwshi' mn ṣapra' hal ramsha'.

wḥzili' ḥemyanih dmwshi' kl dhw be'bada' hwa' lṭayepa': w'meri': mwdy yli' 'aha' shwla' d'ant be'bada' ywet lṭayepa': qamwdy 'ant betyaba' ywet bnapshwk: wklih ṭayepa' beklaya' yli' 'alwk mn ṣapra' hal ramsha':
w'meri' mwshi' lḥemyanwhy: sabab dki' 'ati' lkesly ṭayepa' lbaqwri' mn 'alaha'.
hy 'dana' dhawi' lhwn shwla': ki' 'aty lkesly: wki' daynen biyl 'nasha' wbiyl ḥabrwhy: wki' mad'en qanwni' d'alaha' wnamwswhy.
w'meri' ḥemyanih dmwshi' 'elih: li' yli' ṣpayy shwla' d'ant be'bada' ywet.
menwala' bet nawlet: 'wp 'ant 'wp 'aha' ṭayepa' dyli' 'amwk: sabab dyaqwra' yli' menwk 'aha' shwla': li' maṣet 'abdet lih bnapshwk.
'adya' shm'y bqaly: 'abdenwk ra'yy: whawi' 'alaha' 'amwk. hwy 'ant bwt ṭayepa' qam 'alaha': wma'yet 'ant hagti' lkes 'alaha'.
wmalpet lhwn qanwni' wnamwsi': wmad'et lhwn 'wrḥa' dḥadry byah: wpwlḥana' d'abdy.
w'ant ḥazet mn klih ṭayepa' 'nashi' dḥayla': zed'yi' d'alaha': 'nashi' dsarastwta': sanyani' dqazang na'haq: wmatbet 'alay gwrani' d'alpi': gwrani' d'emi'': gwrani' dḥamshyi': wgwrani' d'esri':
wdayny lṭayepa' bkl zabna': whawya': kl shwla' gwra' ma'yy lkeslwk: wkl shwla' z'wra' dayny 'any: wbet payesh qwlqela' m'alwk: wbet ṭa'ny 'any 'amwk.
'en 'aha' shwla' 'abdet: wpaqed lwk 'alaha': bet maṣet leklaya': w'wp klih 'aha' ṭayepa' ldwktwhy bet 'azel bshlama'.
wshme'li' mwshi' lqalih dḥemyanwhy: w'bedli' kl d'meri'.
wgwbili' mwshi' 'nashi' dḥayla' mn klih ysrayil: wmwtbayli' rishani' 'al ṭayepa': gwrani' d'alpi': gwrani' d'emi'': gwrani' dḥamshyi': wgwrani' d'esri'.
wdenwn lṭayepa' bkl zabna': shwla' qeshya' ki' ma'yy hwaw lkes mwshi': wkl shwla' z'wra' ki' dayny hwaw 'any.
wshwderi' mwshi' lḥemyanwhy: w'zeli' hw l'ar'why.
byarḥa' dṭla' lplaṭa' dbnay ysrayil mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: b'aha' ywma': 'tilwn lbarya' dsynay.
wkweklwn mn rpydym: w'tilwn lbarya' dsynay. wshrilwn gaw barya': wshrili' tama' ysrayil qam ṭwra'.
wmwshi' 'seqli' lkes 'alaha': wqrili' 'elih marya' mn ṭwra': bi'mara': hatka' 'amret lbiyt ya'qwb: wmad'et lbnay ysrayil:
'aḥtwn ḥzilawkwn mendy d'bedly lmeṣrayi': wqam shaqlenawkwn 'al gwlpani' dneshri': wqam ma'yenawkwn lkesly.
w'adya' 'en meshma'ya' sham'ytwn bqaly: wnaṭrytwn lqawly: bet hawytwn ma'l dgany mn klay ṭayepi': sabab ddyy yla' klah 'ar'a'.
w'aḥtwn bet hawytwn qaty malkwta' dkahni' wṭayepa' qadysha'. 'ani' yna' himezmani' dhamzemet 'am bnay ysrayil.
w'tili' mwshi' wqrili' lḥwardeqni' dṭayepa': wmwtebli' qamay lklay 'ani' himezmani' dpqedli' 'elih marya'.
wgwweblwn klih ṭayepa' m'wdali' w'merwn: kl dhwmzemli' marya' bet 'abdak. wmwderi' mwshi' himezmani' dṭayepa' lmarya'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': ha': 'ana' bi'taya' ywen lkeslwk bḥwya' d'nana': qa' dshame' ṭayepa' kad hamzemen 'amwk: w'wp bywk hameny l'alam. wmwde'li' mwshi' himezmani' dṭayepa' lmarya'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': zi' lkes ṭayepa': wqadshet lhwn: 'edyw ywma' wqaydamta': wmasy lgwlay:
whawy mhwdri' lywma' dṭla': sabab dbywma' dṭla' bet ṣali' marya': qam 'ayni' dklih ṭayepa': 'al ṭwra' dsynay.
wmatbet teḥwb lṭayepa' ḥaderwani': bi'mara': hwimwn heshyar 'aḥtwn mn li'saqa' lṭwra' wdqara' bmarzwhy. kl ddaqer bṭwra': myata' payesh mwmyeta'.
la' daqra' byih 'yda': 'ela' mergama' payesh rgyma': yan mekraza' payesh kryza': 'en haywan: yan 'nasha': la' ḥayi'. bmḥayta' dywbaba' 'any 'asqy lṭwra'.
wṣlili' mwshi' mn ṭwra' lkes ṭayepa': wqwdeshli' lṭayepa': wmsilwn lgwlay.
w'meri' lṭayepa': hwimwn mhwdri' lṭla' ywmani': la' qarbenytwn lbakta'.
whwila' bywma' dṭla': kad hwili' ṣapra': hwilwn ra'mi' wberqi' w'nana' zarbanta' 'al ṭwra': wqala' dshypwra' raba' ḥaylana': wrwtretli' klih ṭayepa' dyhwa' b'wrdwy.
wpwleṭli' mwshi' lṭayepa' l'wrḥih d'alaha' mn 'wrdwy: wklilwn b'eshta' dṭwra'.
wṭwra' dsynay tantwni' hwa' klih: sabab dṣelya' hwa' 'alwhy marya' bnwra': w'seqli' tenwhy 'ayk tena' dkwra': wrgedli' klih ṭwra' raba'.
whwili' qala' dshypwra' bi'zala' wzarbwni' raba': mwshi' hamzwmi': w'alaha' gwwbi' 'elih bqala'.
wṣlili' marya' 'al ṭwra' dsynay: lrishih dṭwra': wqrili' marya' lmwshi' lrishih dṭwra': w'seqli' mwshi'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': ṣly sapy qwya' lṭayepa': la' hwi' dtar'y lkes marya' leḥyara' wnapel menih raba'.
w'wp kahni' dqarbeny lkes marya' qadshy ganay: la' hwi' dtare' byay marya'.
w'meri' mwshi' lmarya': li' maṣi' ṭayepa' li'saqa' lṭwra' dsynay: sabab d'ant swpilwk 'elan: bi'mara': mateb teḥwb lṭwra': wqadesh lih.
w'meri' 'elih marya': zi' ṣly: w'asqet 'ant w'ahrwn 'amwk: wkahni' wṭayepa' la' tar'y li'saqa' lkes marya': la' hwi' dhw tare' byay.
wṣlili' mwshi' lkes ṭayepa': w'meri' 'elay.
whwmzemli' 'alaha' klay 'ani' himezmani': bi'mara':
'ana' ywen yihwwa' 'alahwk dpwleṭli' 'elwk mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: mn biyt rigwta'.
la' hawy lwk 'alahi' 'ḥerni' shbwq meny.
la' 'abdet lwk ṣalma': wkl damayta' dbshmaya' m'wlwl: wdba'r'a' m'elteḥ: wdbmya' le'lteḥ mn 'ar'a':
la' sagdet 'elay: wla' palḥet lhwn: sabab d'ana' ywen yihwwa' 'alahwk: 'alaha' ṭanana': saḥberana' d'awla' d'abahi' 'al bnwni': 'al ṭla' w'al 'arb'a' (dawri') lsanyany:
w'abdana' dshapaqat l'alpi': lmaḥebany wlnaṭrani' dpwqdany.
la' shaqlet lshemih dyihwwa' 'alahwk bdagalwta': sabab dli' 'abed ḥalyṣ yihwwa' lhw dshaqel lshemwhy bdagalwta'.
tkwr lywma' dshabat lqadwshwhy.
'eshta' ywmani' palḥet: w'abdet kl pwlḥanwk:
wywma' dshab'a' shabat yla' lyihwwa' 'alahwk: la' 'abdet kl pwlḥana': 'ant: wbrwnwk: wbratwk: rigwk: wḥidamtwk: whaywanwk: wmashaḥaṭwk dyli' btar'anwk:
sabab d'eshta' ywmani' 'bedli' yihwwa' lshmaya' wla'r'a': lyama': wlkl d'yt gaway: wneḥli' bywma' dshab'a'. bwt d'aha': bwrekli' yihwwa' lywma' dshabat: wqwdeshlih.
'bwd 'yqara' lbabwk wlyemwk: qa' dyarky ywmanwk 'al 'ar'a' dmarya' 'alahwk byahba' yli' 'elwk.
la' qaṭlet.
la' 'abdet qahbwta'.
la' ganbet.
la' gwebet 'al shbabwk sahdwta' dagalta'.
la' shawetet lbaytih dshbabwk: la' shawetet lbaktih dshbabwk: wlrigwhy: wlḥidamtwhy: wltawrwhy: wlḥmarwhy: wlkl dyli' lshbabwk.
wklih ṭayepa' beḥzaya' hwaw lra'mi': wllahi': wlqala' dshypwra': wlṭwra' tantwni': wḥzili' ṭayepa': wrwtretlwn: wklilwn mn reḥqa'.
w'merwn lmwshi': hamzem 'ant 'aman wbet sham'ak: wla' hamzem 'aman 'alaha': la' hwi' dmaytak.
w'meri' mwshi' lṭayepa': la' zad'ytwn: sabab dqa' dgareb lawkwn 'tya' yli' 'alaha': wqa' dhawya' zdw'twhy qam patawkwn: dla' ḥaṭytwn.
wklili' ṭayepa' mn reḥqa': wmwshi' qwrbeni' lkes 'arpela': dyhwa' tama' 'alaha'.
w'meri' marya' lmwshi': hatka' 'amret lbnay ysrayil: 'aḥtwn ḥzilawkwn dmn shmaya' hwmzemly 'amawkwn.
la' 'abdytwn 'amy: 'alahi' dsi'ma': w'alahi' ddahba': la' 'abdytwn lawkwn.
madbḥa' d'apra' 'abdet 'ely: wdabḥet 'alwhy debḥwk mwqdi' wqwrbanwk dshlama': 'erbwk wtawrwk. bkl dwka' dmatkeren shemy: bet 'aten lkeslwk wbet barkenwk.
w'en madbḥa' dki'pi' 'abdet 'ely: la' banet lhwn ki'pi' prymi': sabab d'asbabwk mwgweglwk 'alwhy: wkwplenwhy ywet.
wla' 'asqet bpalakani' 'al madbḥy: dla' paysha' glyta' shwlḥaywtwk 'alwhy.
w'ani' yna' shar'ati' dmatbet qamy.
kad zabnet riga' 'ebraya': 'eshta' sheni' paleḥ: wbhy dshaba' paleṭ 'azad ḥwrayy.
'en bnapshwhy 'ati': bnapshwhy paleṭ. 'en mari' bakta' yli': palṭa' baktwhy 'amih.
'en 'agaywhy yahbel lih bakta': wyalda' qatih bnwni' yan bnati': bakta' wyalwh hawya' l'agaywh: whw paleṭ bnapshwhy.
w'en mi'mara' 'amer riga': ki' maḥeben l'agayy: lbakty: wlbnwny: li' palṭen 'azad:
'ayga' ma'yi' lih 'agaywhy lkes dayani': wma'yi' lih lkes tar'a': yan lkes shypani': wbaze' 'agaywhy lnatwhy bbazw'a': wpaleḥ lih hal 'alam.
wkad zaben 'nasha' bratwhy lḥidamta': la' palṭa' 'ayk plaṭta' drigawati'.
'en sarya' b'ayni' d'agaywh: dṭlybwh yli' qa' ganwhy: 'ayga' shabeq dpaysha' pwreqta': lṭayepa' nwkraya' li' hawi' lih hwkma' lzabwnwh: sabab d'byda' yli' pelma' 'elah.
w'en qa' brwnwhy ṭaleb lah: 'ayk shar'at dbnati' 'abed 'elah.
'en ḥda' 'ḥirta' shaqel qatwhy: napaqwh: lbeshtwh: wmadmkwh la' mabṣer.
w'en 'ani' ṭla' la' 'abed qatwh: palṭa' ḥwrayy: dla' zwza'.
hw dmaḥi' l'nasha' wmayet: myata' payesh mwmyeta'.
whw dla' 'abed bwṣa': w'alaha' matpeq lih b'ydwhy: bet matben qatwk dwka' d'areq tama'.
w'en qashder 'nasha' 'al ḥabrwhy leqṭalwhy bli'ba': mn lkes madbḥy shaqlet lih lemyata'.
whw dmaḥi' lbabwhy wlyemwhy: myata' payesh mwmyeta'.
whw dganeb 'nasha' wzabenih: whawi' mkyḥa' b'ydwhy: myata' payesh mwmyeta'.
whw dṣa'er lbabwhy wlyemwhy: myata' payesh mwmyeta'.
wkad maqreṣy 'nashi': wmaḥi' 'nasha' lḥabrwhy bki'pa': yan bgwkma': wla' mayet: wnapel 'al shwyta':
'en qayem wḥader lbadar 'al ḥwṭrwhy: hawi' ḥalyṣ hw dmḥili': 'aḥky bṭaltwhy yahbel: wmabswmi' mabsem lih.
wkad maḥi' 'nasha' lrigwhy: yan lḥidamtwhy bqṭya': wmayet tḥwt 'ydwhy: meshqala' paysha' shqylta' menih tw'la'.
'yna' 'en ḥa' ywma' yan tray ywmani' payesh: la' paysha' shqylta' menih tw'la': sabab dzwzwhy yli'.
wkad palshy 'nashi': wmaḥy lbakta' bṭynta' wpalṭy yalwh: wla' hawi' ḥwzdaga': magrwmi' payesh mwgrema': da'ky dmateb 'alwhy gabra' dbakta': wyahbel byid dayani'.
w'en ḥwzdaga' hawi': yahbet gana' mn giba' dgana':
'ayna' mn giba' d'ayna': kika' mn giba' dkika': 'yda' mn giba' d'yda': 'aqla' mn giba' d'aqla':
kwaya' mn giba' dkwaya': bryn mn giba' dbryn: mḥayta' mn giba' dmḥayta'.
wkad maḥi' 'nasha' l'ayna' drigwhy: yan l'ayna' dḥidamtwhy: wmaḥreb lah: 'azad shaderih mn giba' d'aynwhy.
w'en kika' drigwhy: yan kika' dḥidamtwhy manpel: 'azad shaderih mn giba' dkikwhy.
wkad naqi' tawra' l'nasha' yan lbakta' wmayet: mergama' payesh rgyma' tawra': wla' payesh 'kyla' besrwhy: wmarih dtawra' hawi' ḥalyṣ.
w'en tawra' ki' naqi' hwa' mn temal ywma' 'ḥirna': wpyshta' hwa' yehbelta' sahdwta' lmarwhy: wla' nṭerih: wmwmyetli' 'nasha' yan bakta': tawra' payesh rgyma': w'wp marwhy payesh mwmyeta'.
'en pwḥala' payesh mwtba' 'alwhy: yahbel paraqta' dganwhy 'ayk kl dpayesh mwtba' 'alwhy.
yan lbrwna' naqi': yan lbrata' naqi': 'ayk d'aha' shar'at payesha' 'bydta' 'elih.
'en lriga' naqi' tawra': yan lḥidamta': zwza' tlayy matqali' yahbel l'agaywhy: wtawra' payesh rgyma'.
wkad pateḥ 'nasha' bira': yan kad ḥaper 'nasha' bira' wla' makes lih: wnapel tama' tawra' yan ḥmara':
marih dbira' pare': zwza' mader lmarwhy: wmyta' hawi' qatih.
wkad maḥi' tawra' d'nasha' ltawra' dḥabrwhy: wmayet: zabny lhw tawra' ḥaya': wpaly zwzwhy: w'wp lhw myta' paly.
yan peshla' yd'yta' dtawra' ki' naqi' hwa' mn temal wywma' 'ḥirna': wla' nṭerih marwhy: mepra'ya' pare' tawra' mn giba' dtawra': wmyta' hawi' qatih.
kad ganeb 'nasha' tawra' yan 'erba': wqaṭel lih: yan zabenih: ḥamsha' tawri' pare' mn giba' dtawra': w'arb'a' 'erbi' mn giba' d'erba'.
'en bbza'yta' payesh mwkḥa' ginaba': wpayesh meḥya' wmayet: layt lih dema'.
'en hawi' zryqa' shemsha' 'alwhy: dema' 'yt lih. mepra'ya' pare': 'en layt lih: payesh zwbna' bwt gnabtwhy.
'en mkaḥa' paysha' mwkeḥta' b'ydwhy gnabta': mn tawra' hal ḥmara' hal 'erba': ḥayi': ḥa' btray pare'.
kad ma'kel 'nasha' ḥaqla' yan karma': wdari' qenyanwhy wma'kel lḥaqla' dḥa' 'ḥirna': mn ṣpaywta' dḥaqlwhy wmn ṣpaywta' dkarmwhy pare'.
kad paleṭ nwra': wmaṭi' lketwi': wpayesh 'kyla' gadysha': yan daḥla' l'aqlwh: yan ḥaqla': mepra'ya' pare' maqdana' dmaqadta'.
kad sapi' 'nasha' bḥabrwhy zwza' yan ma'ni' lenṭara': wpayesh gnyba' mn bayta' dhw 'nasha': 'en payesh mwkḥa' ginaba': pare' ḥa' btray.
'en la' payesh mwkḥa' ginaba': qarben marih dbayta' lkes dayani': 'en la' pwsheṭli' 'ydwhy bmendy dḥabrwhy.

bwt kl shwla' dna'haqwta': bwt tawra': bwt ḥmara': bwt 'erba': bwt gwli': bwt kl mendy tlyqa': d'amer: dhw yli' 'aha': lkes dayani' 'ati' shwla' dterway. hw d'abdy lih mari' gnaha' dayani': pari' ḥa' btray lḥabrwhy.
kad sapi' 'nasha' bḥabrwhy ḥmara': yan tawra': yan 'erba': wkl haywan lenṭara': wmayet: yan payesh tbyra': yan payesh slyba': layt ḥazyana':
mawmatih dmarya' hawya' biyl terway: 'en la' pwsheṭli' 'ydwhy bmendy dḥabrwhy: wqabel marwhy: wla' pare'.
w'en megnaba' payesh gnyba' mn lkeslih: pare' lmarwhy.
